# TCMDB - 中药方剂知识引擎

Traditional Chinese Medicine knowledge base with herbs, diseases, innovative drugs, pharmacology research, and clinical/market data

### 雷公藤 (Tripterygium wilfordii)

- name: 雷公藤 (Tripterygium wilfordii)
- category: herbs
- latin_name: Tripterygium wilfordii Hook.f.
- family: Celastraceae (卫矛科)
- part_used: 根木质部
- nature_flavor: 苦、辛，寒，有大毒
- meridian_tropism: 肝、肾经
- functions: 祛风除湿, 活血通络, 消肿止痛, 杀虫解毒
- clinical_applications: 类风湿关节炎, 系统性红斑狼疮, 肾病综合征, 银屑病
- key_compounds: 雷公藤甲素 (Triptolide), 雷公藤内酯醇, 雷公藤红素
- modern_research: 2025年ARD发表研究证实雷公藤甲素纳米制剂治疗RA疗效与甲氨蝶呤相当且肝毒性更低
- toxicity: 生殖毒性、肝毒性、肾毒性，需严格控制剂量
- dosage: 10-25g/日（去根皮），煎服
- contraindications: 孕妇禁用, 育龄期慎用, 肝肾功能不全禁用
- description: 雷公藤为卫矛科植物，根入药，性苦辛寒有大毒，归肝肾经。功效祛风除湿、活血通络、消肿止痛。现代研究发现其活性成分雷公藤甲素具有显著抗炎免疫抑制作用，被广泛用于自身免疫疾病治疗。2025年纳米脂质体递送技术突破了毒性瓶颈。
- sources: [object Object]
- confidence: high
- date_added: 2026-06-25

### 青蒿 (Artemisia annua)

- name: 青蒿 (Artemisia annua)
- category: herbs
- latin_name: Artemisia annua L.
- family: Asteraceae (菊科)
- part_used: 地上部分
- nature_flavor: 苦、辛，寒
- meridian_tropism: 肝、胆经
- functions: 清透虚热, 凉血除蒸, 解暑截疟, 退虚热
- clinical_applications: 疟疾, 阴虚发热, 暑热外感, 肿瘤（辅助治疗）
- key_compounds: 青蒿素 (Artemisinin), 双氢青蒿素 (DHA), 青蒿琥酯
- modern_research: 2025年Phytomedicine发表DHA抗肿瘤机制研究，通过TfR1选择性内吞诱导铁死亡
- dosage: 6-15g/日，煎服（后下）或鲜品绞汁
- description: 青蒿为菊科一年生草本，地上部分入药。性苦辛寒，归肝胆经。功效清透虚热、凉血除蒸、解暑截疟。其活性成分青蒿素由屠呦呦团队发现并因此获2015年诺贝尔生理学或医学奖。2025年研究发现青蒿素衍生物通过铁死亡机制具有抗肿瘤活性。
- sources: [object Object], [object Object]
- confidence: high
- date_added: 2026-06-25

### 三七 (Panax notoginseng)

- name: 三七 (Panax notoginseng)
- category: herbs
- latin_name: Panax notoginseng (Burk.) F.H.Chen
- family: Araliaceae (五加科)
- part_used: 根及根茎
- nature_flavor: 甘、微苦，温
- meridian_tropism: 肝、胃经
- functions: 散瘀止血, 消肿定痛
- clinical_applications: 各种出血证, 跌打损伤, 胸痹心痛, 缺血性脑血管病
- key_compounds: 三七皂苷R1, 人参皂苷Rg1, 人参皂苷Rb1, 三七素
- modern_research: 三七总皂苷(PNS)具有抗血小板、改善微循环、心肌保护作用，以岭药业通心络胶囊核心组分之一
- dosage: 3-9g/日，研粉吞服1-3g
- description: 三七为五加科人参属植物，以根及根茎入药。主产于云南文山、广西田阳。性甘微苦温，归肝胃经。功效益气活血、散瘀止血、消肿定痛，被誉为'金不换'和'血管清道夫'。其活性成分三七总皂苷具有显著的抗血小板和改善微循环作用，是通心络、血塞通等中成药的核心原料。
- sources: [object Object]
- confidence: high
- date_added: 2026-06-25

### 黄芪 (Astragalus membranaceus)

- name: 黄芪 (Astragalus membranaceus)
- category: herbs
- latin_name: Astragalus membranaceus (Fisch.) Bunge
- family: Fabaceae (豆科)
- part_used: 根
- nature_flavor: 甘，微温
- meridian_tropism: 肺、脾经
- functions: 补气升阳, 固表止汗, 利水消肿, 托毒生肌
- clinical_applications: 气虚乏力, 自汗易感冒, 水肿, 疮疡久不收口, 慢性肾病
- key_compounds: 黄芪甲苷 (Astragaloside IV), 黄芪多糖(APS), 异黄酮类
- modern_research: 黄芪多糖(APS)具有免疫调节和抗肿瘤辅助作用；黄芪甲苷具有心肌保护和抗纤维化活性
- dosage: 9-30g/日，煎服
- description: 黄芪为豆科黄耆属植物，以根入药。主产于内蒙古、山西、甘肃。性甘微温，归肺脾经。功效补气升阳、固表止汗、利水消肿、托毒生肌，为补气要药。现代研究表明黄芪多糖和黄芪甲苷具有免疫调节、心肌保护、抗纤维化等多重药理活性。是玉屏风散、补中益气汤等经典名方的核心组成。
- sources: [object Object]
- confidence: high
- date_added: 2026-06-25

### 丹参 (Salvia miltiorrhiza)

- name: 丹参 (Salvia miltiorrhiza)
- category: herbs
- latin_name: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge
- family: Lamiaceae (唇形科)
- part_used: 根及根茎
- nature_flavor: 苦，微寒
- meridian_tropism: 心、心包、肝经
- functions: 活血祛瘀, 通经止痛, 清心除烦, 凉血消痈
- clinical_applications: 胸痹心痛（冠心病）, 月经不调, 疮疡痈肿, 失眠
- key_compounds: 丹参酮IIA (Tanshinone IIA), 丹酚酸B (Salvianolic acid B), 隐丹参酮
- modern_research: 丹参酮IIA具有抗炎、抗氧化、抗肿瘤血管生成活性；丹参多酚酸盐已开发为注射用丹参多酚酸盐(上市药物)
- dosage: 10-15g/日，煎服
- description: 丹参为唇形科鼠尾草属植物，以根及根茎入药。性苦微寒，归心、心包、肝经。功效活血祛瘀、通经止痛、清心除烦、凉血消痈。'一味丹参散，功同四物汤'，是活血化瘀要药。现代药理证实丹参酮和丹酚酸具有改善心肌缺血、抗血小板、抗炎抗氧化等多重活性。已衍生出复方丹参滴丸、丹参注射液等多个中成药大品种。
- sources: [object Object]
- confidence: high
- date_added: 2026-06-25

### HERB-a1b2c3

- name_cn: 红景天
- name_en: Rhodiola
- name_latin: Rhodiola rosea
- category: 补益药
- properties: 甘、涩、寒
- meridian: 肺、心
- key_compounds: 红景天苷、rosavin、rosin、rosarin
- indications: 气虚血瘀、胸痹心痛、中风偏瘫、倦怠气喘
- description: 高山植物，具有抗缺氧、抗疲劳、抗辐射作用，用于治疗高原反应和心血管疾病
- last_updated: 2026-06-27T15:54:53.480Z

### HERB-d4e5f6

- name_cn: 川贝母
- name_en: Fritillary Bulb
- name_latin: Fritillaria cirrhosa
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- properties: 苦、甘、微寒
- meridian: 肺、心
- key_compounds: 贝母碱、去氢贝母碱
- indications: 肺热燥咳、干咳少痰、阴虚劳嗽、咯痰带血
- description: 百合科植物，主治热痰咳嗽，尤宜于燥咳和阴虚咳嗽
- last_updated: 2026-06-27T15:54:53.480Z

### HERB-g7h8i9

- name_cn: 麝香
- name_en: Musk
- name_latin: Moschus berezovskii
- category: 开窍药
- properties: 辛、温
- meridian: 心、脾
- key_compounds: 麝香酮、麝香吡啶
- indications: 热病神昏、中风痰厥、气郁暴厥、中恶昏迷
- description: 珍贵动物药材，具有开窍醒神、活血通经、消肿止痛功效
- last_updated: 2026-06-27T15:54:53.481Z

### HERB-j0k1l2

- name_cn: 潞党参
- name_en: Codonopsis Root
- name_latin: Codonopsis pilosula
- category: 补气药
- properties: 甘、平
- meridian: 脾、肺
- key_compounds: 党参苷、苍术内酯I、苍术内酯II
- indications: 脾肺气虚、食少倦怠、咳嗽虚喘、气血两虚
- description: 参苓白术散君药，具有补中益气、健脾益肺作用，可改善IBS-D情绪状态
- last_updated: 2026-06-27T15:54:53.481Z

### HERB-m3n4o5

- name_cn: 阿育吠陀草药
- name_en: Ayurvedic Herbs
- name_latin: Multiple species
- category: 传统药物
- properties:  varies by herb
- meridian:  varies by herb
- key_compounds:  varies by herb
- indications:  varies by herb
- description: 印度传统医学体系使用的草药，通过量子技术提高生物利用度和靶向性
- last_updated: 2026-06-27T15:54:53.481Z

### Ginseng

- name: Ginseng
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly bitter; neutral. Greatly tonifies original Qi, calms spirit, generates fluids.

### Astragalus

- name: Astragalus
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly warm. Tonifies Qi, raises Yang, consolidates the exterior, promotes diuresis.

### Rehmannia Root

- name: Rehmannia Root
- category: Blood Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly bitter, slightly warm. Nourishes Yin and Blood, enriches essence and marrow.

### Angelica Sinensis

- name: Angelica Sinensis
- category: Blood Tonics
- description: Sweet, acrid, warm. Tonifies blood, invigorates blood circulation, regulates menstruation.

### Licorice Root

- name: Licorice Root
- category: Harmonizing Herbs
- description: Sweet, neutral. Tonifies spleen Qi, clears heat, detoxifies, moderates spasmodic pain.

### Goji Berry

- name: Goji Berry
- category: Yin Tonics
- description: Sweet, neutral. Nourishes liver and kidney Yin, improves vision, benefits essence.

### Dang Shen

- name: Dang Shen
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, neutral. Tonifies middle Jiao Qi, nourishes stomach fluids, aids respiration.

### Cordyceps

- name: Cordyceps
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Sweet, warm. Tonifies kidney Yang, nourishes lung Yin, stops bleeding and phlegm.

### Schisandra Berry

- name: Schisandra Berry
- category: Astringent Herbs
- description: Sweet, sour, warm. Astringes Lung Qi, nourishes Kidney, calms heart, generates fluids.

### Ophiopogon

- name: Ophiopogon
- category: Yin Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly bitter, slightly cold. Nourishes Yin, clears heart heat, generates fluids.

### Dried Ginger

- name: Dried Ginger
- category: Interior Warmers
- description: Pungent, hot. Warms middle Jiao, dispels cold, restores devastated Yang, warns lungs.

### Cinnamon Bark

- name: Cinnamon Bark
- category: Interior Warmers
- description: Sweet, pungent, hot. Warms channels, disperses cold, unblocks circulation, directs rebellious Qi downward.

### Gastrodia

- name: Gastrodia
- category: Herbs for Internal Wind
- description: Sweet, neutral. Calms liver wind, extinguishes convulsions, relieves spastic pain.

### Gypsum

- name: Gypsum
- category: Heat Clearing Herbs
- description: Sweet, pungent, very cold. Clears excess heat from Qi level, purges fire, quenches thirst.

### Scutellaria

- name: Scutellaria
- category: Heat Clearing Herbs
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears damp-heat, purges fire, detoxifies, calms fetus.

### Phellodendron Bark

- name: Phellodendron Bark
- category: Heat Clearing Herbs
- description: Bitter, cold. Drains fire, dries dampness, clears deficiency heat, detoxifies.

### Immortals

- name: Immortals
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, neutral. Tonifies spleen and lung Qi, boosts immunity, benefits organs.

### Polygala

- name: Polygala
- category: Phlegm Resolving Herbs
- description: Bitter, pungent, warm. Invigorates intelligence, calms spirit, resolves phlegm.

### Ziziphus Seed

- name: Ziziphus Seed
- category: Calming Herbs
- description: Sweet, sour, neutral. Nourishes heart Yin, calms spirit, benefits spleen.

### Evodia Fruit

- name: Evodia Fruit
- category: Interior Warmers
- description: Acrid, hot, toxic. Warms middle, directs rebellious Qi downward, stops pain.

### Ginseng

- name: Ginseng
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly bitter; mildly warm. Greatly tonifies primordial Qi, nourishes Yin, clears heat, calms spirit.

### Astragalus Root

- name: Astragalus Root
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, slightly warm. Tonifies Qi, raises Yang, consolidates exterior, promotes urination, reduces edema.

### Angelica Sinensis

- name: Angelica Sinensis
- category: Blood Tonics
- description: Sweet, acrid, warm. Tonifies blood, invigorates blood, regulates menstruation, relieves pain.

### Rehmannia Root

- name: Rehmannia Root
- category: Yin Tonics
- description: Sweet, bitter, cold. Nourishes Yin, clears heat, generates fluids, cools blood, stops bleeding.

### Licorice Root

- name: Licorice Root
- category: Harmonizers
- description: Sweet, neutral. Tonifies spleen Qi, clears heat, detoxifies, moistens lungs, moderates spasms.

### Goji Berry

- name: Goji Berry
- category: Yin Tonics
- description: Sweet, neutral. Nourishes liver and kidney Yin, improves vision, benefits essence and marrow.

### Cordyceps

- name: Cordyceps
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Sweet, warm. Tonifies kidney Yang, nourishes lung Yin, stops bleeding, resolves phlegm.

### Dang Shen

- name: Dang Shen
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Sweet, neutral. Tonifies middle burner Qi, nourishes blood, generates fluids, calms spirit.

### Bupleurum Root

- name: Bupleurum Root
- category: Harmonizers
- description: Acrid, slightly bitter, cool. Relieves exterior, soothes liver, raises Yang, separates yang from yin.

### Chinese Goldthread

- name: Chinese Goldthread
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears heat, dries dampness, purges fire, detoxifies. Treats damp-heat and fire toxicity.

### Phellodendron Bark

- name: Phellodendron Bark
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears heat, dries dampness, purges fire, detoxifies. Especially clears lower jiao damp-heat.

### Anemarrhena Rhizome

- name: Anemarrhena Rhizome
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, sweet, cold. Clears heat, purges fire, nourishes Yin, moistens dryness, generates fluids.

### Scutellaria Root

- name: Scutellaria Root
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears heat, dries dampness, purges fire, detoxifies, calms fetus, stops bleeding.

### Gardenia Fruit

- name: Gardenia Fruit
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears heat, eliminates irritability, drains damp-heat, cools blood, resolves swelling.

### Forsythia Fruit

- name: Forsythia Fruit
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Sweet, cold. Clears heat, detoxifies, disperses wind-heat, reduces swelling, treats sores.

### Honeysuckle Flower

- name: Honeysuckle Flower
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Sweet, cold. Clears heat, detoxifies, disperses wind-heat, treats sores and carbuncles.

### Isatis Root

- name: Isatis Root
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Acrid, slightly cold. Clears heat, detoxifies, cools blood, reduces swelling, benefits throat.

### Coptis Rhizome

- name: Coptis Rhizome
- category: Heat-Clearers
- description: Bitter, cold. Clears heat, dries dampness, purges fire, detoxifies. Strongest herb for clearing heart fire.

### Evodia Fruit

- name: Evodia Fruit
- category: Interior-Warming
- description: Acrid, hot. Warms middle, disperses cold, stops vomiting, directs rebellious Qi downward, stops pain.

### Dried Ginger

- name: Dried Ginger
- category: Interior-Warming
- description: Acrid, hot. Warms middle, disperses cold, restores devastated Yang, warms lungs to transform phlegm.

### 人参

- name: 人参
- category: 补气药
- description: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智

### 黄芪

- name: 黄芪
- category: 补气药
- description: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌

### 白术

- name: 白术
- category: 补气药
- description: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎

### 甘草

- name: 甘草
- category: 补气药
- description: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药

### 当归

- name: 当归
- category: 补血药
- description: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便

### 熟地黄

- name: 熟地黄
- category: 补血药
- description: 补血滋阴，益精填髓

### 白芍

- name: 白芍
- category: 补血药
- description: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳

### 川芎

- name: 川芎
- category: 活血祛瘀药
- description: 活血行气，祛风止痛

- description: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛

- description: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒

### 黄芩

- category: 清热药
- description: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒，止血，安胎

- name: 金银花
- category: 清热药
- description: 清热解毒，疏散风热

### 板蓝根

- name: 板蓝根
- category: 清热药
- description: 清热解毒，凉血利咽

### 枸杞子

- name: 枸杞子
- category: 补阴药
- description: 滋补肝肾，益精明目

### 麦冬

- name: 麦冬
- category: 补阴药
- description: 养阴生津，润肺清心

### 五味子

- name: 五味子
- category: 收涩药
- description: 收敛固涩，益气生津，补肾宁心

### 茯苓

- name: 茯苓
- category: 利水渗湿药
- description: 利水渗湿，健脾，宁心

### 陈皮

- name: 陈皮
- category: 理气药
- description: 理气健脾，燥湿化痰

### 半夏

- name: 半夏
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- description: 燥湿化痰，降逆止呕，消痞散结

### 人参 (Ginseng)

- name: 人参 (Ginseng)
- category: 补气药
- description: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智

### 黄芪 (Astragalus)

- name: 黄芪 (Astragalus)
- category: 补气药
- description: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌

### 白术 (Atractylodes)

- name: 白术 (Atractylodes)
- category: 补气药
- description: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎

### 甘草 (Licorice Root)

- name: 甘草 (Licorice Root)
- category: 补气药
- description: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药

### 当归 (Angelica Sinensis)

- name: 当归 (Angelica Sinensis)
- category: 补血药
- description: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便

### 熟地黄 (Rehmannia Root)

- name: 熟地黄 (Rehmannia Root)
- category: 补血药
- description: 滋阴补血，益精填髓

### 白芍 (White Peony Root)

- category: 补血药
- description: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳

### 川芎 (Chuanxiong)

- name: 川芎 (Chuanxiong)
- category: 活血化瘀药
- description: 活血行气，祛风止痛

- category: 活血化瘀药
- description: 活血调经，祛瘀止痛，凉血消痈，除烦安神

- category: 活血化瘀药
- description: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛

### Cistanche

- name: Cistanche
- category: Yang Tonic
- description: Tonifies kidney Yang, moistens intestines

### Cornus

- name: Cornus
- category: Astringent
- description: Conserves essence, tonifies liver and kidneys

### Huang Qi

- name: Huang Qi
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Astragalus membranaceus root; sweet, slightly warm; tonifies Qi, raises Yang, consolidates exterior, promotes diuresis

### Dang Shen

- name: Dang Shen
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Codonopsis pilosula root; sweet, neutral; tonifies middle Jiao, enriches Qi, nourishes fluids

### Bai Zhu

- name: Bai Zhu
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Atractylodes macrocephala rhizome; bitter, sweet, warm; strengthens spleen, dries dampness, promotes diuresis, calms fetus

### Gan Cao

- name: Gan Cao
- category: Harmonizing Herbs
- description: Glycyrrhiza uralensis root; sweet, neutral; tonifies spleen Qi, clears heat, resolves toxicity, moderates spasms

- name: Ren Shen
- category: Qi Tonics
- description: Panax ginseng root; sweet, slightly bitter, slightly warm; powerfully tonifies primal Qi, calms spirit, generates fluids

### Lu Rong

- name: Lu Rong
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Cervus nippon antler; salty, warm; tonifies Kidney Yang, benefits essence and blood, strengthens bones and sinews

- name: Tu Si Zi
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Cuscuta chinensis seed; sweet, pungent, neutral; tonifies Kidney Yang and Yin, secures essence, brightens eyes

- name: Ba Ji Tian
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Morinda officinalis root; sweet, pungent, warm; tonifies Kidney Yang, strengthens sinews and bones, dispels wind-damp

- name: Yin Yang Huo
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Epimedium brevicornum leaf; acrid, sweet, warm; tonifies Kidney Yang, strengthens bones, dispels wind-damp obstruction

- name: Du Zhong
- category: Yang Tonics
- description: Eucommia ulmoides bark; sweet, warm; tonifies Liver and Kidney, strengthens sinews and bones, calms fetus

- category: Blood/Yin Tonics
- description: Lycium barbarum fruit; sweet, neutral; nourishes Liver and Kidney Yin, benefits essence and blood, improves vision

- category: Blood/Yin Tonics
- description: Rehmannia glutinosa root (processed); sweet, slightly warm; nourishes Yin, tonifies Blood, enriches Kidney essence

- category: Yin Tonics
- description: Ophiopogon japonicus tuber; sweet, slightly bitter, slightly cold; nourishes stomach Yin, clears heart heat, generates fluids

- category: Blood Tonics
- description: Donkey-hide gelatin; sweet, neutral; nourishes Blood, stops bleeding, moistens dryness, calms fetus

- name: Zhu Ru
- category: Phlegm-Heat Clearing
- description: Bambusa textilis stem wall; sweet, slightly cold; clears heat, resolves phlegm, harmonizes Stomach, calms fetus

### 枸杞

- name: 枸杞
- name_en: Goji Berry / Wolfberry
- latin_name: Lycium barbarum
- family: 茄科 (Solanaceae)
- description: 枸杞是药食同源的明星食材，自古以来就被列为上品。现代研究证实其富含枸杞多糖、类胡萝卜素、甜菜碱、维生素A/B1/C及多种矿物质，具有增强免疫、护肝明目、抗衰老等多重功效。
- nutrition: 多糖、类胡萝卜素、甜菜碱、维生素A、维生素B1、维生素C、钙、铁、锌
- health_benefits: 增强免疫力：每日15克枸杞，三个月后T淋巴细胞活性提升约15%, 护肝养肝：坚持食用3个月，脂肪肝患者ALT下降约12.6%, 明目护眼：每天20粒，30天眼疲劳症状减轻率60%以上, 延缓衰老：多酚和多糖类物质清除自由基, 调节血脂血糖：坚持10-15克/天，8周空腹血糖下降3.5-5%, 增强体力与抗疲劳, 促进睡眠安神, 辅助调节血压保护心血管
- edible_methods: 泡水喝（水温不超85℃，喝完嚼食枸杞）, 煲汤煮粥（弱火煮30分钟以上）, 直接嚼食（每日10-15克）, 打粉制膏（加蜂蜜冲服）
- recommended_daily_dose: 10-20克（约15-20粒）
- contraindications: 体质偏热易上火者减量；感冒发烧期间暂停；腹泻者慎用
- source: https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/500102737, https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 红枸杞

- name: 红枸杞
- name_en: Red Goji Berry
- latin_name: Lycium barbarum
- type: 红果枸杞
- description: 最常见的枸杞品种，药性偏平，适合多数人日常调理。富含枸杞多糖、胡萝卜素、甜菜碱等，具有补肝肾、益精明目的功效。
- key_components: 枸杞多糖、β-胡萝卜素、甜菜碱、维生素A、维生素C、铁、锌
- health_benefits: 增强免疫力、护肝明目、延缓衰老、调节血糖血脂
- edible_methods: 泡水、煲汤、嚼食、打粉
- contraindications: 体质偏热者减量
- source: https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 黑枸杞

- name: 黑枸杞
- name_en: Black Goji Berry
- latin_name: Lycium barbarum (black variant)
- type: 黑果枸杞
- description: 黑枸杞与普通红枸杞属同种异型，但花青素含量远高于红枸杞。花青素是强效抗氧化剂，对视力保护、防晒抗老化效果尤为突出。
- key_components: 花青素（极高）、枸杞多糖、微量元素
- unique_features: 花青素含量极高，泡水温度务必控制在60℃以下以保护花青素不被破坏
- health_benefits: 抗辐射、抗衰老、保护视力、清除自由基
- comparison_with_red: 红枸杞药性偏平适合日常调理；黑枸杞花青素更多适合抗老防辐射
- edible_methods: 低温水冲泡（60℃以下）、泡茶
- source: https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 枸杞多糖

- name: 枸杞多糖
- name_en: Polysaccharides from Goji Berry
- latin_name: N/A
- type: 活性成分
- description: 枸杞中最核心的活性成分之一，是从枸杞中提取的多糖类物质。具有显著的免疫调节、抗肿瘤、降血糖、降血脂等生物学活性。
- functions: 增强免疫：提升T淋巴细胞活性, 调节血糖：改善胰岛素敏感性, 调节血脂：降低胆固醇, 抗肿瘤：抑制癌细胞生长, 抗氧化：清除自由基, 保护肝脏：减轻肝细胞脂肪变性
- scientific_evidence: 多项动物和人体实验证实，每日食用15克枸杞可使T淋巴细胞活性提升约15%，坚持8周空腹血糖下降3.5-5%
- source: https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/500102737, https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 甜菜碱

- name: 甜菜碱
- name_en: Betaine
- latin_name: N/A
- type: 活性成分
- description: 枸杞中重要的活性成分之一，是一种天然甲基供体。在肝脏中发挥重要作用，有助减轻肝细胞脂肪变性，保护肝脏组织。
- functions: 护肝：减轻肝细胞脂肪变性，辅助治疗脂肪肝, 降低同型半胱氨酸水平, 参与甲基化反应, 调节渗透压
- clinical_evidence: 纳入216例脂肪肝患者的临床随访发现，坚持食用枸杞3个月，肝功能指标ALT下降约12.6%
- source: https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 类胡萝卜素

- name: 类胡萝卜素
- name_en: Carotenoids
- latin_name: N/A
- type: 活性成分
- description: 枸杞中丰富的色素类化合物，包括β-胡萝卜素、玉米黄质等。是维生素A的前体物质，对眼睛健康和抗氧化至关重要。
- key_types: β-胡萝卜素、玉米黄质、叶黄素
- health_benefits: 护眼明目：为视网膜提供充足维生素A，缓解干涩和视力模糊, 抗氧化：清除自由基, 增强免疫
- clinical_data: 每天食用20颗枸杞，连续30天后，主观眼疲劳症状减轻率在60%以上
- source: https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/500102737, https://www.sohu.com/a/938609590_121948382
- retrieved_date: 2026-07-09
- language: zh

### 黄柏

- name: 黄柏
- latin_name: Phellodendron chinense / Phellodendron amurense
- family: 芸香科（Rutaceae）
- genus: 黄檗属（Phellodendron）
- species: 川黄柏 Phellodendron chinense, 关黄柏 Phellodendron amurense
- part_used: 干燥树皮
- nature_flavor: 苦，寒
- meridian_entrada: 肾、膀胱经
- functions: 清热燥湿，泻火除蒸，解毒疗疮
- indications: 湿热泻痢，黄疸尿赤，带下阴痒，热淋涩痛，脚气痿躄，骨蒸劳热，盗汗遗精
- dosage: 6-12g
- special_note: 专清下焦湿热，为下焦清湿猛将
- contraindications: 苦寒伤胃，脾胃虚寒者慎用
- processing_methods: 生黄柏, 盐黄柏, 黄酒黄柏, 炒黄柏
- distribution: 四川、湖北、贵州、云南、江西、浙江等省，海拔900米以上杂木林
- harvest_time: 剥取树皮后除去粗皮晒干
- source_references: 百度百科, 中医百科, 搜狐健康
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 麻黄

- name: 麻黄
- latin_name: Ephedra sinica
- family: 麻黄科
- origin: 中国北方
- active_component: 麻黄碱(ephedrine)
- dose: 2-9g
- toxicity: 低毒
- function: 发汗散寒，宣肺平喘，利水消肿
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 附子

- name: 附子
- latin_name: Aconiti Lateralis Radix Praeparata
- family: 毛茛科
- origin: 四川
- active_component: 乌头碱(aconitine)
- dose: 3-15g(先煎)
- toxicity: 大毒
- function: 回阳救逆，补火助阳，散寒止痛
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 连翘

- name: 连翘
- latin_name: Forsythiae Fructus
- family: 木樨科
- origin: 河南
- active_component: 连翘酯苷(forsythin)
- dose: 6-15g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 清热解毒，消肿散结，疏散风热
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 大青叶

- name: 大青叶
- latin_name: Isatidis Folium
- family: 十字花科
- origin: 江苏
- active_component: 靛玉红(indirubin)
- dose: 9-15g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 清热解毒，凉血消斑
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 柴胡

- name: 柴胡
- latin_name: Bupleuri Radix
- family: 伞形科
- origin: 辽宁
- active_component: 柴胡皂苷(saikosaponin)
- dose: 3-10g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 疏散退热，疏肝解郁，升举阳气
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 酸枣仁

- name: 酸枣仁
- latin_name: Ziziphi Spinosae Semen
- family: 鼠李科
- origin: 陕西
- active_component: 斯皮诺素(spinosin)
- dose: 9-15g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 养心补肝，宁心安神，敛汗，生津
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 桃仁

- name: 桃仁
- latin_name: Persicae Semen
- family: 蔷薇科
- origin: 山东
- active_component: 苦杏仁酶
- dose: 6-12g
- toxicity: 小毒
- function: 活血祛瘀，润肠通便，止咳平喘
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 红花

- name: 红花
- latin_name: Carthami Flos
- family: 菊科
- origin: 新疆
- active_component: 红花黄色素
- dose: 3-10g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 活血通经，散瘀止痛
- source: xiaowu_sync
- synced_at: 2026-07-16

### 蒲公英

- family: 菊科
- origin: 全国
- active_component: 蒲公英醇
- dose: 10-15g
- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 清热解毒，消肿散结，利湿通淋

- active_component: 鱼腥草素(hordenine)

- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 清热解毒，消痈排脓，利尿通淋

- active_component: 泽泻醇(zeaxanthin)

- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 利水渗湿，泄热，化浊降脂

- active_component: 车前子胶

- function: 清热利尿通淋，渗湿止泻，明目，祛痰

- active_component: 薏苡仁酯

- toxicity: 无毒
- function: 利水渗湿，健脾止泻，除痹，排脓，解毒散结

### 天南星

- active_component: 去氧升麻素

- toxicity: 无毒

### tcm-herb-001

- name_cn: 冬虫夏草
- name_en: Cordyceps Sinensis
- latin_name: Cordyceps sinensis
- family: 麦角菌科 Cordycipitaceae
- part_used: 子座及幼虫尸体的干燥复合体
- origin: 中国西藏、青海、四川、甘肃等高寒地带
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 3-10
- active_compounds: 虫草素(cordycepin)、腺苷、多糖、甘露醇
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补肾益肺，止血化痰
- indications_tcm: 肾虚精亏，阳痿遗精，腰膝酸痛；久咳虚喘，劳嗽咯血，自汗盗汗
- dosage_g: 3-9
- contraindications: 外邪亢盛者忌服
- modern_research: 免疫调节、抗疲劳、改善心血管功能、抗肿瘤活性
- status: 野生濒危，CITES附录II

### tcm-herb-002

- name_cn: 灵芝
- name_en: Reishi Mushroom
- latin_name: Ganoderma lucidum
- family: 灵芝科 Ganodermataceae
- part_used: 子实体
- origin: 中国吉林、辽宁、河北、安徽、浙江、广东等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.5-5
- active_compounds: 三萜类化合物、多糖、核苷类、甾醇类
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肺、肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补气安神，止咳平喘
- indications_tcm: 心神不宁，失眠心悸，虚劳咳喘，气短乏力
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 有湿邪者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫力、镇静催眠、保肝、降血糖、抗肿瘤
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-003

- name_cn: 藏红花
- name_en: Saffron
- latin_name: Crocus sativus
- family: 鸢尾科 Iridaceae
- part_used: 柱头
- origin: 原产伊朗，现中国西藏、北京、上海、浙江、江苏等地有栽培
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 1-5
- active_compounds: 藏红花素、藏红花醛、苦杏仁苷
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肝经
- functions_tcm: 活血化瘀，凉血解毒，解郁安神
- indications_tcm: 经闭癥瘕，产后瘀阻，温毒发斑，忧郁痞闷，惊悸发狂
- dosage_g: 1-3
- contraindications: 孕妇禁用
- modern_research: 抗抑郁、抗氧化、保护心脑血管、抗癌活性
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-004

- name_cn: 鹿茸
- name_en: Velvet Antler
- latin_name: Cervus nippon (未骨化密生绒毛的幼角)
- family: 鹿科 Cervidae
- part_used: 雄鹿未骨化的幼角
- origin: 中国吉林、黑龙江、辽宁、内蒙古、新疆等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.5-3
- active_compounds: 鹿茸精、生长因子、氨基酸、磷脂、胆固醇
- properties_tcm: 甘、咸，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肾、肝经
- functions_tcm: 壮肾阳，益精血，强筋骨，调冲任，托疮毒
- indications_tcm: 肾阳不足，精血亏虚，阳痿滑精，宫冷不孕，羸瘦，神疲，畏寒；眩晕耳鸣，腰膝冷痛；崩漏下血，宫寒不孕；阴疽不敛
- dosage_g: 1-2
- contraindications: 阴虚火旺者忌服
- modern_research: 促进生长发育、增强免疫功能、抗衰老、促进骨折愈合
- status: 人工养殖

### tcm-herb-005

- name_cn: 人参
- name_en: Ginseng
- latin_name: Panax ginseng C.A.Mey.
- family: 五加科 Araliaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国吉林、辽宁、黑龙江；朝鲜、韩国、俄罗斯远东地区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.2-50
- active_compounds: 人参皂苷(ginsenosides)、多糖、挥发油、氨基酸
- properties_tcm: 甘、微苦，平
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、肺、心、肾经
- functions_tcm: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智
- indications_tcm: 大失血、大泻痢、大病之后导致的元气虚脱证；肺气虚弱，咳喘气短；脾气不足，倦怠食少；热病气津两伤，口渴；心气不足，心悸失眠
- dosage_g: 3-9
- contraindications: 实证、热证而正气不虚者忌服；反藜芦，恶五灵脂
- modern_research: 增强免疫力、抗疲劳、改善认知功能、调节血糖血压、抗衰老
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-006

- name_cn: 黄芪
- name_en: Astragalus
- latin_name: Astragalus membranaceus
- family: 豆科 Fabaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国内蒙古、山西、甘肃、黑龙江、宁夏、陕西等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 黄芪甲苷、黄芪多糖、皂苷类、氨基酸
- properties_tcm: 甘，微温
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、肺经
- functions_tcm: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌
- indications_tcm: 气虚乏力，食少便溏；中气下陷，脏器脱垂；表虚自汗；气虚水肿，小便不利；气血不足，面色萎黄；气虚血滞，半身不遂；痈疽不溃，久不收口
- dosage_g: 9-30
- contraindications: 表实邪盛，气滞湿阻，食积内停，阴虚阳亢，疟疾，疔疮肿毒者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫功能、利尿保肝、降压降糖、抗骨质疏松
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-007

- name_cn: 当归
- name_en: Angelica Sinensis
- latin_name: Angelica sinensis (Oliv.) Diels
- family: 伞形科 Apiaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国甘肃、云南、四川、湖北、陕西、贵州等地；甘肃岷县为最佳产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.15
- active_compounds: 阿魏酸、藁本内酯、多糖、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 甘、辛，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、心、脾经
- functions_tcm: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便
- indications_tcm: 血虚萎黄，眩晕心悸，月经不调，经闭痛经，虚寒腹痛，风湿痹痛，跌扑损伤，痈疽疮疡，肠燥便秘
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 湿盛中满，大便溏泄者慎用
- modern_research: 补血、调节子宫功能、抗血小板聚集、保护心血管、抗氧化
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-008

- name_cn: 枸杞子
- name_en: Goji Berry
- latin_name: Lycium barbarum
- family: 茄科 Solanaceae
- part_used: 成熟果实
- origin: 中国宁夏、甘肃、青海、新疆、内蒙古、河北等地；宁夏中宁为道地药材
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.2
- active_compounds: 枸杞多糖、甜菜碱、胡萝卜素、玉米黄素
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 滋补肝肾，益精明目
- indications_tcm: 肝肾阴虚，眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软，内热消渴，血虚萎黄，目昏不明
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 外邪实热，脾虚便溏者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫、抗衰老、保护视力、降血脂、保肝
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-009

- name_cn: 三七
- name_en: Notoginseng
- latin_name: Panax notoginseng (Burk.) F.H.Chen
- family: 五加科 Araliaceae
- part_used: 根和根茎
- origin: 中国云南文山、广西靖西、田阳；云南为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.1-2
- active_compounds: 三七总皂苷(PNS)、田七氨酸、黄酮类
- properties_tcm: 甘、微苦，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、胃经
- functions_tcm: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛
- indications_tcm: 咯血，吐血，衄血，便血，崩漏，外伤出血，胸腹刺痛，跌扑肿痛
- dosage_g: 3-9
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 止血、活血化瘀、保护心血管、抗炎、镇痛
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-010

- name_cn: 川贝母
- name_en: Fritillaria Cirrhosa
- latin_name: Fritillaria cirrhosa
- family: 百合科 Liliaceae
- part_used: 鳞茎
- origin: 中国四川、云南、西藏、青海、甘肃、贵州、陕西等地；四川为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.8-3
- active_compounds: 生物碱(川贝碱、西贝素)、皂苷、淀粉
- properties_tcm: 苦、甘，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、心经
- functions_tcm: 清热润肺，化痰止咳，散结消痈
- indications_tcm: 肺热燥咳，干咳少痰，阴虚劳嗽，咯血，瘰疬，乳痈，肺痈
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 不宜与乌头类药材同用；脾胃虚寒及湿痰者慎用
- modern_research: 镇咳祛痰、平喘、降压、抗癌
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-011

- name_cn: 天麻
- name_en: Gastrodia
- latin_name: Gastrodia elata Blume
- family: 兰科 Orchidaceae
- part_used: 块茎
- origin: 中国贵州、云南、四川、湖北、陕西、甘肃、吉林、辽宁等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.3-2
- active_compounds: 天麻素(gastrodin)、香荚兰醇、多糖
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肝经
- functions_tcm: 息风止痉，平抑肝阳，祛风通络
- indications_tcm: 小儿惊风，癫痫抽搐，破伤风；肝阳上亢，头痛眩晕；肢体麻木，筋脉拘挛，风湿痹痛
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 气血亏虚所致之眩晕惊厥慎用
- modern_research: 镇静催眠、抗惊厥、改善脑循环、降血压、神经保护
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-012

- name_cn: 金银花
- name_en: Honeysuckle
- latin_name: Lonicera japonica Thunb.
- family: 忍冬科 Caprifoliaceae
- part_used: 花蕾或带初开的花
- origin: 中国山东、河南、河北、安徽、辽宁、云南、广西等地；山东平邑为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 绿原酸、木犀草素、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 甘，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、心、胃经
- functions_tcm: 清热解毒，疏散风热
- indications_tcm: 痈肿疔疮，喉痹，丹毒，热毒血痢，风热感冒，温病发热
- dosage_g: 6-15
- contraindications: 脾胃虚寒及气虚疮疡脓清者慎用
- modern_research: 广谱抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎、解热、保肝利胆
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-013

- name_cn: 石斛
- name_en: Dendrobium
- latin_name: Dendrobium officinale Kimura et Migo
- family: 兰科 Orchidaceae
- part_used: 茎
- origin: 中国云南、贵州、广西、四川、湖北、福建、广东、安徽、浙江等地；霍山石斛为道地药材
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.1-3
- active_compounds: 石斛碱、石斛多糖、氨基酸、微量元素
- properties_tcm: 甘，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归胃、肾经
- functions_tcm: 益胃生津，滋阴清热
- indications_tcm: 热病津伤，口干烦渴，胃阴不足，胃痛干呕，病后虚热，目暗不明
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 湿温病尚未化燥者慎用
- modern_research: 养胃生津、增强免疫、抗氧化、降血糖、保护视力
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-014

- name_cn: 阿胶
- name_en: Donkey-Hide Gelatin
- latin_name: Colla Corii Asini
- family: 动物胶（驴皮）
- part_used: 驴皮经煎煮浓缩制成的固体胶
- origin: 中国山东东阿镇为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.2-1
- active_compounds: 胶原蛋白、多种氨基酸、微量元素
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补血滋阴，润燥，止血
- indications_tcm: 血虚萎黄，眩晕心悸，肌痿无力，心烦不眠，虚风内动，肺燥咳嗽，劳嗽咯血，吐血尿血，妇人崩漏，妊娠胎漏，跌打损伤
- dosage_g: 3-9
- contraindications: 脾胃虚弱，食欲不振，脘腹胀满，大便溏泄者慎用
- modern_research: 补血、改善钙代谢、抗休克、增强免疫力
- status: 传统工艺制品

### tcm-herb-015

- name_cn: 党参
- name_en: Codonopsis
- latin_name: Codonopsis pilosula
- family: 桔梗科 Campanulaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国山西、甘肃、陕西、四川、河南、湖北、安徽等地；山西上党为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 党参多糖、党参皂苷、氨基酸、微量元素
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、肺经
- functions_tcm: 健脾益肺，养血生津
- indications_tcm: 脾肺气虚，食少便溏，咳嗽气短，气血不足，心悸失眠，面色萎黄，内热消渴
- dosage_g: 9-30
- contraindications: 实证、热证慎用；不宜与藜芦同用
- modern_research: 增强免疫力、改善贫血、调节胃肠功能、抗溃疡、抗肿瘤
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-016

- name_cn: 白术
- name_en: Atractylodes Macrocephala
- latin_name: Atractylodes macrocephala Koidz.
- family: 菊科 Asteraceae
- part_used: 根茎
- origin: 中国浙江、湖南、湖北、江西、安徽、福建、四川等地；浙江于潜为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.1
- active_compounds: 苍术酮、苍术素、白术内酯、多糖
- properties_tcm: 苦、甘，温
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、胃经
- functions_tcm: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎
- indications_tcm: 脾虚食少，腹胀泄泻，痰饮眩悸，水肿，自汗，胎动不安
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 阴虚内热，津液亏耗者慎用
- modern_research: 调节胃肠运动、利尿、保肝、增强免疫、抗肿瘤
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-017

- name_cn: 甘草
- name_en: Licorice
- latin_name: Glycyrrhiza uralensis Fisch.
- family: 豆科 Fabaceae
- part_used: 根和根茎
- origin: 中国内蒙古、甘肃、新疆、宁夏、山西、陕西等地；内蒙古为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 甘草酸、甘草苷、异甘草素
- properties_tcm: 甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肺、脾、胃经
- functions_tcm: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药
- indications_tcm: 脾胃虚弱，倦怠乏力，心悸气短；咳嗽气喘；脘腹或四肢挛急疼痛；痈肿疮毒，药食中毒
- dosage_g: 2-10
- contraindications: 湿盛胀满，浮肿者慎用；不宜与大戟、芫花、海藻、甘遂同用；长期大量使用可引起假醛固酮增多症
- modern_research: 抗炎、抗过敏、保肝解毒、镇咳祛痰、肾上腺皮质激素样作用
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-018

- name_cn: 杜仲
- name_en: Eucommia Bark
- latin_name: Eucommia ulmoides Oliv.
- family: 杜仲科 Eucommiaceae
- part_used: 树皮
- origin: 中国贵州、四川、湖北、陕西、云南、湖南、甘肃、重庆等地；贵州为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 杜仲胶、松脂醇二葡萄糖苷、绿原酸
- properties_tcm: 甘，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补肝肾，强筋骨，安胎
- indications_tcm: 肝肾不足，腰膝酸痛，筋骨无力；头晕目眩，妊娠漏血，胎动不安
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 阴虚火旺者慎用
- modern_research: 降血压、强筋骨、利尿、抗炎、调节血脂
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-019

- name_cn: 丹参
- name_en: Salvia Miltiorrhiza
- latin_name: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 根及根茎
- origin: 中国山东、河南、广东、广西、四川、江苏、安徽、陕西等地；山东为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 丹参酮、丹酚酸、鼠尾草酸
- properties_tcm: 苦，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肝经
- functions_tcm: 活血祛瘀，通经止痛，清心除烦，凉血消痈
- indications_tcm: 胸痹心痛，脘腹胁痛，癥瘕积聚，跌打损伤，月经不调，痛经经闭，心烦不寐，疮疡肿毒
- dosage_g: 6-15
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用；不宜与藜芦同用
- modern_research: 改善微循环、抗血栓、保护心肌、保肝、抗氧化
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-020

- name_cn: 麦冬
- name_en: Ophiopogon
- latin_name: Ophiopogon japonicus (L.f.) Ker-Gawl.
- family: 百合科 Liliaceae
- part_used: 块根
- origin: 中国浙江、江苏、湖北、陕西、广东、福建、山东、安徽等地；浙江慈溪为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.05-0.2
- active_compounds: 甾体皂苷、高异黄酮类、多糖
- properties_tcm: 甘、微苦，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肺、胃经
- functions_tcm: 养阴生津，润肺清心
- indications_tcm: 肺燥干咳，阴虚痨嗽，喉痹咽痛，津伤口渴，内热消渴，心烦失眠，肠燥便秘
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 外感风寒或肺胃有痰湿者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫、抗炎、保护心血管、镇静催眠、降血糖
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-021

- name_cn: 茯苓
- name_en: Poria
- latin_name: Poria cocos (Schw.) Wolf
- family: 多孔科 Polyporaceae
- part_used: 菌核
- origin: 中国云南、安徽、湖北、河南、四川、贵州、江西等地；云南茯苓为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.06
- active_compounds: 茯苓酸、茯苓聚糖、粗蛋白
- properties_tcm: 甘、淡，平
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肺、脾、肾经
- functions_tcm: 利水渗湿，健脾，宁心
- indications_tcm: 水肿尿少，痰饮眩悸，脾虚食少，便溏泄泻，心神不安，惊悸失眠
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 虚寒精滑者慎用
- modern_research: 利尿、增强免疫、抗肿瘤、镇静、保肝
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-022

- name_cn: 陈皮
- name_en: Tangerine Peel
- latin_name: Citrus reticulata Blanco 及栽培变种的干燥果皮
- family: 芸科 Rutaceae
- part_used: 成熟果皮
- origin: 中国广东、福建、浙江、江苏、四川、江西、湖南等地；广东新会为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.15
- active_compounds: 挥发油、橙皮苷、花椒油脂素
- properties_tcm: 苦、辛，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、脾经
- functions_tcm: 理气健脾，燥湿化痰
- indications_tcm: 脘腹胀满，食少吐泻，咳嗽痰多
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 气虚及阴虚燥咳者慎用
- modern_research: 促消化、祛痰平喘、抗炎、抗氧化、降血脂
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-023

- name_cn: 黄芩
- name_en: Scutellaria
- latin_name: Scutellaria baicalensis Georgi
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国内蒙古、辽宁、河北、山西、陕西、甘肃、山东、四川、贵州等地；河北、山西为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 黄芩苷、黄芩素、汉黄芩素
- properties_tcm: 苦，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、胆、脾、大肠、小肠经
- functions_tcm: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒，止血，安胎
- indications_tcm: 湿温暑湿，胸闷呕恶，湿热痞满，泻痢，黄疸，肺热咳嗽，高热烦渴，血热吐衄，痈肿疮毒，胎动不安
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 苦寒伤胃，脾胃虚寒者慎用
- modern_research: 抗菌抗病毒、抗炎、解热、降压、保肝利胆、抗肿瘤
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-024

- name_cn: 黄连
- name_en: Coptis
- latin_name: Coptis chinensis Franch.
- family: 毛茛科 Ranunculaceae
- part_used: 根茎
- origin: 中国重庆石柱县、湖北、湖南、四川、贵州、陕西、甘肃等地；重庆石柱为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.1-0.5
- active_compounds: 小檗碱(berberine)、黄连碱、甲基黄连碱
- properties_tcm: 苦，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归心、脾、胃、肝、胆、大肠经
- functions_tcm: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒
- indications_tcm: 湿热痞满，呕吐吞酸，泻痢，黄疸，高热神昏，心火亢盛，心烦不寐，血热吐衄，目赤吞酸，牙痛，消渴，痈肿疔疮；外治湿疹，湿疮，耳道流脓
- dosage_g: 2-5
- contraindications: 苦寒伤胃，脾胃虚寒者慎用；苦燥伤阴，阴虚津伤者慎用
- modern_research: 抗菌、抗腹泻、降血糖、降血脂、抗心律失常、抗肿瘤
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-025

- name_cn: 枸杞叶
- name_en: Goji Leaf
- latin_name: Lycium barbarum L.
- family: 茄科 Solanaceae
- part_used: 叶
- origin: 中国宁夏、甘肃、青海、新疆、内蒙古、河北等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.05
- active_compounds: 甜菜碱、枸杞多糖、维生素C、β-胡萝卜素
- properties_tcm: 甘、苦，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、心、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补虚益精，清热明目，祛风除湿
- indications_tcm: 虚劳发热，烦渴，目赤昏蒙，眩晕，瘰疬，风湿痹痛
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 脾胃虚寒者慎用
- modern_research: 降血糖、降血脂、增强免疫、抗氧化、神经保护
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-026

- name_cn: 白芍
- name_en: White Peony Root
- latin_name: Paeonia lactiflora Pall.
- family: 芍药科 Paeoniaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国安徽、湖北、四川、云南、贵州、山东、陕西、甘肃、内蒙古等地；安徽铜陵为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 芍药苷、苯甲酸、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 苦、酸，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、脾经
- functions_tcm: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳
- indications_tcm: 血虚萎黄，月经不调，自汗，盗汗，胁肋脘腹疼痛，四肢挛急疼痛，肝阳上亢，头痛眩晕
- dosage_g: 6-15
- contraindications: 虚寒证慎用
- modern_research: 镇静镇痛、解痉、抗炎、免疫调节、保肝
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-027

- name_cn: 薏苡仁
- name_en: Coix Seed
- latin_name: Coix lacryma-jobi L.
- family: 禾本科 Poaceae
- part_used: 种仁
- origin: 中国辽宁、内蒙古、河北、山东、江苏、安徽、台湾、福建、江西、广东、广西、四川、贵州、云南等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.005-0.02
- active_compounds: 薏苡仁酯、薏苡仁油、薏苡仁多糖、蛋白质
- properties_tcm: 甘、淡，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、胃、肺经
- functions_tcm: 利水渗湿，健脾止泻，除痹，排脓，解毒散结
- indications_tcm: 水肿，脚气，小便不利，湿痹拘挛，脾虚泄泻，肺痈，肠痈
- dosage_g: 9-30
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用；津亏口燥，大便坚结，经前期慎用
- modern_research: 抗肿瘤、免疫调节、降血糖、降血脂、保护心血管
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-028

- name_cn: 板蓝根
- name_en: Isatis Root
- latin_name: Isatis indigotica Fort.
- family: 十字花科 Brassicaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国东北、华北、西北、华东；河北、黑龙江、江苏为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 靛蓝、靛玉红、氨基酸、核苷类
- properties_tcm: 苦，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归心、胃经
- functions_tcm: 清热解毒，凉血利咽
- indications_tcm: 温疫时毒，发热咽痛，温毒发斑，痄腮，烂喉丹痧，大头瘟，丹毒，痈肿
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 脾胃虚寒者慎用
- modern_research: 抗病毒、抗菌、抗炎、解热、增强免疫
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-029

- name_cn: 连翘
- name_en: Forsythia
- latin_name: Forsythia suspensa (Thunb.) Vahl
- family: 木犀科 Oleaceae
- part_used: 果实
- origin: 中国河北、河南、山东、安徽、江苏、江西、湖北、四川、陕西、山西、云南、贵州等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.15
- active_compounds: 连翘酯苷、连翘苷、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 苦，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、心、小肠经
- functions_tcm: 清热解毒，消肿散结，疏散风热
- indications_tcm: 痈肿疮毒，瘰疬痰核，风热外感，温病初起，热病口渴，小便短赤
- dosage_g: 6-15
- contraindications: 气虚疮疡脓清者慎用；脾胃虚寒者慎用
- modern_research: 广谱抗菌、抗病毒、抗炎、解热、保护肝脏
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-030

- name_cn: 西洋参
- name_en: American Ginseng
- latin_name: Panax quinquefolius L.
- family: 五加科 Araliaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 原产北美，现中国北京、河北、山西、吉林、辽宁、黑龙江、山东、安徽等地有栽培
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.5-5
- active_compounds: 人参皂苷(Rb1为主)、多糖、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 甘、微苦，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肺、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补气养阴，清热生津
- indications_tcm: 气阴两伤，湿热未清，倦怠乏力，咽干口燥，胃阴不足，胃脘隐痛，火热内盛，气虚外感
- dosage_g: 3-6
- contraindications: 中阳衰微，胃有寒湿者忌服
- modern_research: 增强免疫、抗疲劳、改善认知、调节血糖、适应原样作用
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-031

- name_cn: 胖大海
- name_en: Sterculia Lychnophora
- latin_name: Sterculia lychnophora Hance
- family: 梧桐科 Sterculiaceae
- part_used: 种子
- origin: 中国广东、广西、云南；越南、柬埔寨、泰国、老挝等东南亚国家
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.05-0.3
- active_compounds: 胖大海素、半乳糖、阿拉伯糖
- properties_tcm: 甘，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、大肠经
- functions_tcm: 清热润肺，利咽开音，润肠通便
- indications_tcm: 肺热声哑，咽喉疼痛，咳嗽，燥热便秘
- dosage_g: 2-3
- contraindications: 脾胃虚寒，大便溏泄者慎用；孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 抗炎、镇痛、保肝、降血压、抗肿瘤
- status: 进口为主

### tcm-herb-032

- name_cn: 肉桂
- name_en: Cinnamon Bark
- latin_name: Cinnamomum cassia Presl
- family: 樟科 Lauraceae
- part_used: 树皮
- origin: 中国广东、广西、云南、福建；越南、印度、印度尼西亚也有分布
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 桂皮醛、桂皮酸、桂皮醇
- properties_tcm: 辛、甘，大热
- meridians_tcm: 归肾、脾、心、肝经
- functions_tcm: 补火助阳，引火归元，散寒止痛，温通经脉
- indications_tcm: 阳痿宫冷，腹中冷痛，经闭久瘕，心腹冷痛，寒痹腰痛，寒凝血瘀之经痛，虚寒吐泻
- dosage_g: 2-5
- contraindications: 孕妇禁用；阴虚火旺、里有实热、血热妄行者慎用
- modern_research: 抗菌、抗真菌、抗炎、镇痛、降血糖、改善循环
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-033

- name_cn: 菊花
- name_en: Chrysanthemum
- latin_name: Chrysanthemum morifolium Ramat.
- family: 菊科 Asteraceae
- part_used: 头状花序
- origin: 中国浙江桐乡、安徽亳州、安徽黄山、河南焦作、河北邢台等地；杭菊为道地药材
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.08
- active_compounds: 黄酮类、挥发油、胆碱、腺嘌呤
- properties_tcm: 辛、甘、苦，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、肝经
- functions_tcm: 散风清热，平肝明目，清热解毒
- indications_tcm: 风热感冒，头痛眩晕，目赤肿痛，眼目昏花，疮痈肿毒
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 气血虚者慎用
- modern_research: 抗炎、抗菌、抗病毒、解热、降血压、保护视力
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-034

- name_cn: 决明子
- name_en: Cassia Seed
- latin_name: Cassia tora L. 或 Cassia obtusifolia L.
- family: 豆科 Fabaceae
- part_used: 成熟种子
- origin: 中国广西、广东、四川、安徽、浙江、湖北、江西、福建、云南、贵州等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.05
- active_compounds: 大黄酚、大黄素、决明子苷
- properties_tcm: 甘、苦、咸，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、大肠经
- functions_tcm: 清热明目，润肠通便
- indications_tcm: 目赤涩痛，羞明多泪，目暗不明，头痛眩晕，肠燥便秘
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 低血压患者慎用；孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 降血脂、降血压、润肠通便、抗菌、护肝
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-035

- name_cn: 薄荷
- name_en: Peppermint
- latin_name: Mentha haplocalyx Briq.
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 地上部分
- origin: 中国江苏、浙江、安徽、湖北、四川、广东、贵州、江西等地；江苏为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.05
- active_compounds: 薄荷醇、薄荷酮、薄荷苷
- properties_tcm: 辛，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、肝经
- functions_tcm: 疏散风热，清利头目，利咽，透疹，疏肝行气
- indications_tcm: 风热感冒，温病初起，头痛目赤，喉痹，口疮，风疹麻疹，胸胁胀闷
- dosage_g: 3-6
- contraindications: 体虚多汗者慎用；不宜久煎
- modern_research: 解热镇痛、抗炎、抗菌、抗病毒、促进消化
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-036

- name_cn: 牛黄
- name_en: Calculus Bovis
- latin_name: 牛的胆结石
- family: 动物药
- part_used: 胆结石
- origin: 中国内蒙古、河北、山东、河南、江苏、安徽、四川等地；以内蒙古产量最大
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 50-100
- active_compounds: 胆红素、胆酸、胆固醇、氨基酸
- properties_tcm: 甘，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肝经
- functions_tcm: 化痰开窍，凉肝息风，清热解毒
- indications_tcm: 热病神昏，中风痰迷，癫痫发狂，小儿惊风，口舌生疮，喉痹，痈肿疮毒
- dosage_g: 0.15-0.35
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 镇静抗惊厥、解热、保护心脏、保肝利胆
- status: 天然牛黄稀缺，有人工牛黄替代

### tcm-herb-037

- name_cn: 附子
- name_en: Aconite Lateral Root
- latin_name: Aconitum carmichaelii Debx (子根的加工品)
- family: 毛茛科 Ranunculaceae
- part_used: 侧根(子根)
- origin: 中国四川、湖北、陕西、湖南、江西、浙江、安徽等地；四川江油为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 乌头碱(aconitine)、次乌头碱、新乌头碱
- properties_tcm: 辛、甘，大热；有毒
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肾、脾经
- functions_tcm: 回阳救逆，补火助阳，散寒止痛
- indications_tcm: 亡阳虚脱，肢冷脉微；阳气不足，畏寒肢冷，阳虚水肿；心腹冷痛，寒痹剧痛
- dosage_g: 3-15
- contraindications: 孕妇禁用；不宜与半夏、瓜蒌、瓜蒌子、瓜蒌仁、天花粉、川贝母、浙贝母、平贝母、伊贝母、湖北贝母、白蔹、白及同用；必须先煎、久煎
- modern_research: 强心、抗炎、镇痛、增强免疫、改善微循环
- status: 需炮制后使用，有毒

### tcm-herb-038

- name_cn: 延胡索
- name_en: Corydalis
- latin_name: Corydalis yanhusuo W.T.Wang
- family: 罂粟科 Papaveraceae
- part_used: 块茎
- origin: 中国浙江、湖北、江苏、安徽、辽宁、江西、四川等地；浙江为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.1
- active_compounds: 延胡索乙素(tetrahydropalmatine)、甲素、丑素
- properties_tcm: 辛、苦，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、脾、心经
- functions_tcm: 活血，行气，止痛
- indications_tcm: 胸胁刺痛，产后瘀阻腹痛，跌扑肿痛，各种痛证
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 镇痛、镇静催眠、抗溃疡、抗心律失常、抗抑郁
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-039

- name_cn: 远志
- name_en: Polygala Root
- latin_name: Polygala tenuifolia Willd.
- family: 远志科 Polygalaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国内蒙古、辽宁、河北、山西、黑龙江、吉林、山东、河南、陕西、甘肃、湖北、江苏、浙江等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.15
- active_compounds: 远志皂苷、远志碱、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 苦、辛，温
- meridians_tcm: 归心、肾、肺经
- functions_tcm: 安神益智，交通心肾，祛痰开窍，消散痈肿
- indications_tcm: 心神不安，惊悸失眠，健忘；痰阻心窍，癫痫发狂，神昏谵语；咳嗽痰多，痈疽疮毒，乳房肿痛，喉痹
- dosage_g: 3-10
- contraindications: 有胃炎及胃溃疡者慎用
- modern_research: 镇静催眠、改善记忆、祛痰、抗惊厥、抗菌、神经保护
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-040

- name_cn: 葛根
- name_en: Kudzu Root
- latin_name: Pueraria lobata (Willd.) Ohwi
- family: 豆科 Fabaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国安徽、河南、浙江、湖北、江苏、广东、广西、湖南、江西、福建、贵州、四川等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 葛根素(puerarin)、大豆苷、染料木苷
- properties_tcm: 甘、辛，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归脾、胃经
- functions_tcm: 解肌退热，生津止渴，透疹，升阳止泻，通经活络，解酒毒
- indications_tcm: 表证发热，项背强痛，麻疹不透，热病口渴，消渴，泄泻，醉酒
- dosage_g: 10-15
- contraindications: 胃寒呕吐者慎用；表虚多汗者慎用
- modern_research: 扩张脑血管和冠状动脉、降血压、降血糖、解酒、改善更年期症状
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-041

- name_cn: 益母草
- name_en: Motherwort
- latin_name: Leonurus japonicus Houtt.
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 地上部分
- origin: 中国东北、华北、华东、华中、西南、西北；全国各地均有分布
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.03
- active_compounds: 益母草碱、水苏碱、哈巴俄苷
- properties_tcm: 辛、苦，微寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、心包、膀胱经
- functions_tcm: 活血调经，利尿消肿，清热解毒
- indications_tcm: 月经不调，痛经经闭，恶露不尽，水肿尿少，疮疡肿毒
- dosage_g: 9-30
- contraindications: 孕妇禁用；无瘀滞者慎用
- modern_research: 收缩子宫、利尿、改善微循环、抗炎、保护心血管
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-042

- name_cn: 泽兰
- name_en: Eupatorium
- latin_name: Lycopus lucidus Turcz. var. hirtus Regel
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 地上部分
- origin: 中国黑龙江、吉林、辽宁、内蒙古、河北、山西、山东、江苏、安徽、浙江、福建、江西、湖北、湖南、广东、广西、四川
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.05
- active_compounds: 泽兰苷、齐墩果酸、熊果酸
- properties_tcm: 苦、辛，微温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、脾经
- functions_tcm: 活血调经，祛瘀消痈，利水消肿
- indications_tcm: 月经不调，经闭痛经，产后瘀滞腹痛，水肿，跌打损伤，痈肿疮毒
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用
- modern_research: 活血、抗炎、利尿、抑菌
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-043

- name_cn: 紫苏
- name_en: Perilla
- latin_name: Perilla frutescens (L.) Britt.
- family: 唇形科 Lamiaceae
- part_used: 叶、梗、籽
- origin: 中国浙江、湖北、辽宁、江苏、广东等地；全国各地广泛栽培
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.01-0.05
- active_compounds: 紫苏醛、紫苏酮、挥发油
- properties_tcm: 辛，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肺、脾经
- functions_tcm: 解表散寒，行气和胃
- indications_tcm: 风寒感冒，咳嗽气喘，脾胃气滞，脘腹胀满，食少纳呆，妊娠呕吐，鱼蟹中毒
- dosage_g: 6-10
- contraindications: 表虚自汗者慎用
- modern_research: 解热抗炎、抗菌、抗病毒、镇咳祛痰、保护胃黏膜
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-044

- name_cn: 桑寄生
- name_en: Taxillus
- latin_name: Taxillus chinensis (DC.) Danser
- family: 桑寄生科 Loranthaceae
- part_used: 带叶茎枝
- origin: 中国广东、广西、湖南、湖北、四川、贵州、云南、浙江、安徽、江西、福建、台湾
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 槲皮素、金丝桃苷、桑寄生黄酮
- properties_tcm: 苦、甘，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 祛风湿，补肝肾，强筋骨，安胎
- indications_tcm: 风湿痹痛，腰膝酸软，筋骨无力，崩漏经多，妊娠漏血，胎动不安
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 无明显禁忌
- modern_research: 降血压、镇静、利尿、抗炎、抗肿瘤
- status: 半寄生植物，可人工培育

### tcm-herb-045

- name_cn: 何首乌
- name_en: Polygonum Multiflorum
- latin_name: Polygonum multiflorum Thunb.
- family: 蓼科 Polygonaceae
- part_used: 块根
- origin: 中国河北、河南、湖北、广西、广东、贵州、四川、山东、江苏、浙江、安徽、福建、江西、辽宁等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.1
- active_compounds: 结合型蒽醌、游离型蒽醌、二苯乙烯苷、磷脂
- properties_tcm: 苦、甘、涩，温；制何首乌无毒，生何首乌有小毒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、心、肾经
- functions_tcm: 制何首乌：补肝肾，益精血，乌须发，强筋骨，化浊降脂；生何首乌：解毒，消痈，润肠通便
- indications_tcm: 制：肝肾精血不足，眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软，遗精崩带，须发早白，耳鸣目暗，肢体麻木，高脂血症；生：瘰疬疮痈，风疹瘙痒，肠燥便秘
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 有肝病史者慎用制何首乌；便溏泄泻者慎用生何首乌
- modern_research: 降血脂、抗氧化、抗衰老、增强免疫、促进造血
- status: 可人工栽培；注意肝毒性风险

### tcm-herb-046

- name_cn: 熟地黄
- name_en: Prepared Rehmannia Root
- latin_name: Rehmannia glutinosa Libosch. (经炮制的根)
- family: 玄参科 Scrophulariaceae
- part_used: 根(蒸晒至黑色)
- origin: 中国河北、河南、山东、江苏、安徽、山西、陕西、四川、贵州、辽宁等地；河南为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 梓醇、毛蕊花糖苷、环烯醚萜苷
- properties_tcm: 甘，微温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补血滋阴，益精填髓
- indications_tcm: 血虚萎黄，眩晕心悸，月经不调，崩漏下血；肝肾阴虚，腰膝酸软，骨蒸潮热，盗汗遗精，内热消渴，耳鸣耳聋，须发早白，小儿囟门不合
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 气滞痰多，脘腹胀痛，食少便溏者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫、促进造血、降血糖、抗衰老、神经保护
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-047

- name_cn: 龟甲
- name_en: Tartarise Turtle Shell
- latin_name: Trionyx sinensis Wiegmann (背甲及腹甲)
- family: 动物药-鳖科
- part_used: 背甲及腹甲
- origin: 中国湖北、江苏、安徽、江西、湖南、广东、广西、四川、河南等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.05-0.3
- active_compounds: 胶原蛋白、钙、多种氨基酸
- properties_tcm: 甘、咸，寒
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾、心经
- functions_tcm: 滋阴潜阳，益肾强骨，养血补心，固经止崩
- indications_tcm: 阴虚潮热，骨蒸盗汗，头晕目眩，虚风内动；肾阴不足，筋骨不健，囟门不合，腰膝酸痛；阴虚血热，月经量多，经血不下，崩漏
- dosage_g: 6-24
- contraindications: 脾胃虚弱者慎用
- modern_research: 补钙、增强免疫、镇静、促进骨折愈合
- status: 传统药材

### tcm-herb-048

- name_cn: 牛膝
- name_en: Achyranthes Root
- latin_name: Achyranthes bidentata Blume
- family: 苋科 Amaranthaceae
- part_used: 根
- origin: 中国河北、山东、河南、安徽、江苏、湖北、四川、贵州、广西、广东、云南等地；牛膝以山西、河北、河南、山东为道地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 蜕皮激素、皂苷、多糖
- properties_tcm: 苦、甘、酸，平
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 逐瘀通经，通利关节，利尿通淋，引血下行
- indications_tcm: 经闭癥瘕，胞衣不下，跌扑伤痛，筋骨痿软，湿热下注，足膝痿软肿胀，淋证，尿血，牙龈肿痛，头痛眩晕
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 孕妇慎用；中气下陷，脾虚泄泻，下元不固之多尿、遗精慎用
- modern_research: 抗炎、镇痛、促进骨折愈合、降血压、调节血脂
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-049

- name_cn: 沙苑子
- name_en: Astragalus Complanatus
- latin_name: Astragalus complanatus R.Br.
- family: 豆科 Fabaceae
- part_used: 成熟种子
- origin: 中国内蒙古、山西、河北、山东、陕西、甘肃、江苏、安徽等地；内蒙古乌兰察布为道地产区
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.03-0.1
- active_compounds: 沙苑子苷、黄芪碱、皂苷
- properties_tcm: 甘，温
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 补肾助阳，固精缩尿，养肝明目
- indications_tcm: 肾虚腰痛，阳痿遗精，遗尿尿频，白浊带下，视物昏花
- dosage_g: 9-15
- contraindications: 相火炽盛，小便不利者慎用
- modern_research: 降血压、降血糖、增强免疫、改善肾功能
- status: 可人工栽培

### tcm-herb-050

- name_cn: 女贞子
- name_en: Privet Fruit
- latin_name: Ligustrum lucidum Ait.
- family: 木犀科 Oleaceae
- part_used: 成熟果实
- origin: 中国江苏、安徽、浙江、江西、山东、湖南、湖北、福建、广东、广西、四川、贵州、云南等地
- price_range_cny_per_gram: 0.02-0.08
- active_compounds: 齐墩果酸、女贞子苷、甘露醇
- properties_tcm: 甘、苦，凉
- meridians_tcm: 归肝、肾经
- functions_tcm: 滋补肝肾，明目乌发
- indications_tcm: 肝肾阴虚，眩晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软，须发早白，目暗不明，内热消渴，骨蒸潮热
- dosage_g: 6-12
- contraindications: 脾胃虚寒，泄泻者慎用
- modern_research: 增强免疫、保肝、降血脂、抗衰老、神经保护
- status: 可人工栽培

### 人参

- name: 人参
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘、微苦
- taste: 微温
- meridian: 脾、肺、心经
- functions: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智
- source: 五加科植物人参的干燥根和根茎
- dosage: 3～9g
- note: 不宜与藜芦同用
- status: active

### 黄芪

- name: 黄芪
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 微温
- meridian: 脾、肺经
- functions: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌
- source: 豆科植物蒙古黄芪或膜荚黄芪的干燥根
- dosage: 9～30g
- note: 表实邪盛、气滞湿阻者慎用
- status: active

### 当归

- name: 当归
- category: 补血药
- nature: 甘、辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肝、心、脾经
- functions: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便
- source: 伞形科植物当归的干燥根
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 湿盛中满、大便泄泻者慎用
- status: active

### 枸杞子

- name: 枸杞子
- category: 补阴药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 滋补肝肾，益精明目
- source: 茄科植物宁夏枸杞的干燥成熟果实
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 外邪实热、脾虚便溏者慎用
- status: active

### 甘草

- name: 甘草
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 心、肺、脾、胃经
- functions: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药
- source: 豆科植物甘草、胀果甘草或光果甘草的干燥根和根茎
- dosage: 2～10g
- note: 不宜与大戟、芫花、甘遂、海藻同用
- status: active

### 金银花

- name: 金银花
- category: 清热解毒药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 肺、心、胃经
- functions: 清热解毒，疏散风热
- source: 忍冬科植物忍冬的干燥花蕾或带初开的花
- dosage: 6～15g
- note: 脾胃气虚、肠滑泄泻者慎用
- status: active

### 川芎

- name: 川芎
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肝、胆、心包经
- functions: 活血行气，祛风止痛
- source: 伞形科植物川芎的干燥根茎
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 阴虚火旺、月经过多者慎用
- status: active

### 白术

- name: 白术
- category: 补气药
- nature: 苦、甘
- taste: 温
- meridian: 脾、胃经
- functions: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎
- source: 菊科植物白术的干燥根茎
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 阴虚燥渴、多汗者慎用
- status: active

### 茯苓

- name: 茯苓
- category: 利水渗湿药
- nature: 甘、淡
- taste: 平
- meridian: 心、肺、脾、肾经
- functions: 利水渗湿，健脾，宁心
- source: 多孔菌科真菌茯苓的干燥菌核
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 虚寒小便不利者慎用
- status: active

### 陈皮

- name: 陈皮
- category: 理气药
- nature: 辛、苦
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肺、脾经
- functions: 理气健脾，燥湿化痰
- source: 芸香科植物橘及其栽培变种的干燥成熟果皮
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 阴虚燥咳、吐血者慎用
- status: active

### 丹参

- name: 丹参
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 心、心包、肝经
- functions: 活血调经，祛瘀止痛，凉血消痈，除烦安神
- source: 唇形科植物丹参的干燥根和根茎
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 不宜与藜芦同用
- status: active

### 半夏

- name: 半夏
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 脾、胃、肺经
- functions: 燥湿化痰，降逆止呕，消痞散结
- source: 天南星科植物半夏的干燥块茎
- dosage: 3～9g
- note: 阴虚燥咳、津伤口渴者慎用
- status: active

### 黄连

- name: 黄连
- category: 清热燥湿药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 心、脾、胃、肝、胆、大肠经
- functions: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒
- source: 毛茛科植物黄连、三角叶黄连或云连的干燥根茎
- dosage: 2～5g
- note: 脾胃虚寒者慎用
- status: active

### 麻黄

- name: 麻黄
- category: 解表药
- nature: 辛、微苦
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肺、膀胱经
- functions: 发汗解表，宣肺平喘，利水消肿
- source: 麻黄科植物草麻黄、木贼麻黄或中麻黄的干燥草质茎
- dosage: 2～10g
- note: 表虚自汗、阴虚盗汗及肺肾虚喘者慎用
- status: active

### 桂枝

- name: 桂枝
- category: 解表药
- nature: 辛、甘
- taste: 温
- meridian: 心、肺、膀胱经
- functions: 发汗解肌，温通经脉，助阳化气
- source: 樟科植物肉桂的干燥嫩枝
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 温热病、阴虚火旺者慎用
- status: active

### 白芍

- name: 白芍
- category: 补血药
- nature: 苦、酸
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 肝、脾经
- functions: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳
- source: 毛茛科植物芍药的干燥根
- dosage: 6～15g
- note: 反藜芦
- status: active

### 熟地黄

- name: 熟地黄
- category: 补血药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 微温
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 补血滋阴，益精填髓
- source: 玄参科植物地黄的块根经炮制加工而成
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 脾虚湿滞、腹满便溏者慎用
- status: active

### 泽泻

- name: 泽泻
- category: 利水渗湿药
- nature: 甘、淡
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 肾、膀胱经
- functions: 利水渗湿，泄热，化浊降脂
- source: 泽泻科植物泽泻的干燥块茎
- dosage: 6～10g
- note: 肾虚滑精、无湿热者慎用
- status: active

### 厚朴

- name: 厚朴
- category: 理气药
- nature: 苦、辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 脾、胃、肺、大肠经
- functions: 燥湿消痰，下气除满
- source: 木兰科植物厚朴或凹叶厚朴的干燥树皮
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 孕妇慎用
- status: active

### 柴胡

- name: 柴胡
- category: 解表药
- nature: 辛、苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 肝、胆、肺经
- functions: 疏散退热，疏肝解郁，升举阳气
- source: 伞形科植物柴胡或狭叶柴胡的干燥根
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 肝阳上亢、头痛眩晕者慎用
- status: active

### 黄芩

- name: 黄芩
- category: 清热燥湿药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 肺、胆、脾、大肠、小肠经
- functions: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒，止血，安胎
- source: 唇形科植物黄芩的干燥根
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 脾胃虚寒者慎用
- status: active

### 连翘

- name: 连翘
- category: 清热解毒药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 肺、心、小肠经
- functions: 清热解毒，消肿散结，疏散风热
- source: 木犀科植物连翘的干燥果实
- dosage: 6～15g
- note: 气虚疮疡脓少者慎用
- status: active

### 板蓝根

- name: 板蓝根
- category: 清热解毒药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 心、胃经
- functions: 清热解毒，凉血利咽
- source: 十字花科植物菘蓝的干燥根
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 脾胃虚寒者慎用
- status: active

### 菊花

- name: 菊花
- category: 解表药
- nature: 辛、甘、苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 肺、肝经
- functions: 疏散风热，平抑肝阳，清肝明目，清热解毒
- source: 菊科植物菊的干燥头状花序
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 气虚胃寒、脾胃虚弱者慎用
- status: active

### 薄荷

- name: 薄荷
- category: 解表药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 凉
- meridian: 肺、肝经
- functions: 疏散风热，清利头目，利咽，透疹，疏肝行气
- source: 唇形科植物薄荷的干燥地上部分
- dosage: 3～6g
- note: 体虚多汗者慎用
- status: active

### 附子

- name: 附子
- category: 温里药
- nature: 辛、甘
- taste: 大热
- meridian: 心、肾、脾经
- functions: 回阳救逆，补火助阳，散寒止痛
- source: 毛茛科植物乌头的子根的加工品
- dosage: 3～15g
- note: 孕妇禁用，不宜与半夏、瓜蒌、贝母、白蔹同用
- status: active

### 干姜

- name: 干姜
- category: 温里药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 热
- meridian: 脾、胃、肾、心、肺经
- functions: 温中散寒，回阳通脉，温肺化饮
- source: 姜科植物姜的干燥根茎
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 孕妇及阴虚火旺者慎用
- status: active

### 党参

- name: 党参
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 脾、肺经
- functions: 补中益气，健脾益肺，生津养血
- source: 桔梗科植物党参、素花党参或川党参的干燥根
- dosage: 9～30g
- note: 不宜与藜芦同用
- status: active

### 砂仁

- name: 砂仁
- category: 化湿药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 脾、胃、肾经
- functions: 化湿开胃，温脾止泻，理气安胎
- source: 姜科植物阳春砂、绿壳砂或海南砂的干燥成熟果实
- dosage: 3～6g
- note: 阴虚血燥者慎用
- status: active

### 山药

- name: 山药
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 脾、肺、肾经
- functions: 补脾养胃，生津益肺，补肾涩精
- source: 薯蓣科植物薯蓣的干燥根茎
- dosage: 15～30g
- note: 湿盛中满、积滞者慎用
- status: active

### 杜仲

- name: 杜仲
- category: 补阳药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 补肝肾，强筋骨，安胎
- source: 杜仲科植物杜仲的干燥树皮
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 阴虚火旺者慎用
- status: active

### 淫羊藿

- name: 淫羊藿
- category: 补阳药
- nature: 辛、甘
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 补肾阳，强筋骨，祛风湿
- source: 小檗科植物淫羊藿、箭叶淫羊藿或柔毛淫羊藿的干燥叶
- dosage: 6～10g
- note: 阴虚火旺者慎用
- status: active

### 女贞子

- name: 女贞子
- category: 补阴药
- nature: 甘、苦
- taste: 凉
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 滋补肝肾，明目乌发
- source: 木犀科植物女贞子的干燥成熟果实
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 脾胃虚寒泄泻者慎用
- status: active

### 麦冬

- name: 麦冬
- category: 补阴药
- nature: 甘、微苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 心、肺、胃经
- functions: 养阴生津，润肺清心
- source: 百合科植物麦冬的干燥块根
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 脾胃虚寒、湿痰者慎用
- status: active

### 五味子

- name: 五味子
- category: 收涩药
- nature: 酸、甘
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肺、心、肾经
- functions: 收敛固涩，益气生津，补肾宁心
- source: 木兰科植物五味子或华中五味子的干燥成熟果实
- dosage: 2～6g
- note: 表邪未解、内有实热、咳嗽初起者慎用
- status: active

### 山楂

- name: 山楂
- category: 消食药
- nature: 酸、甘
- taste: 微温
- meridian: 脾、胃、肝经
- functions: 消食健胃，行气散瘀，化浊降脂
- source: 蔷薇科植物山里红或山楂的干燥成熟果实
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 脾胃虚弱无积滞者及孕妇慎用
- status: active

### 莱菔子

- name: 莱菔子
- category: 消食药
- nature: 辛、甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肺、脾、胃经
- functions: 消食除胀，降气化痰
- source: 十字花科植物萝卜的干燥成熟种子
- dosage: 6～10g
- note: 气虚及无食积气滞者慎用
- status: active

### 大黄

- name: 大黄
- category: 泻下药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 脾、胃、大肠、肝、心包经
- functions: 泻下攻积，清热泻火，止血，解毒，活血祛瘀
- source: 蓼科植物掌叶大黄、唐古特大黄或药用大黄的干燥根和根茎
- dosage: 3～30g
- note: 孕妇禁用，哺乳期及月经期慎用
- status: active

### 芒硝

- name: 芒硝
- category: 泻下药
- nature: 咸、苦
- taste: 寒
- meridian: 胃、大肠经
- functions: 泻下通便，润燥软坚，清火消肿
- source: 硫酸盐类矿物芒硝族的天然芒硝
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 孕妇禁用
- status: active

### 枳实

- name: 枳实
- category: 理气药
- nature: 苦、辛、酸
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 脾、胃经
- functions: 破气消积，化痰散痞
- source: 芸香科植物酸橙或其栽培变种的干燥幼果
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 孕妇慎用
- status: active

### 香附

- name: 香附
- category: 理气药
- nature: 辛、微苦、微甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肝、脾、三焦经
- functions: 疏肝解郁，理气宽中，调经止痛
- source: 莎草科植物莎草的干燥根茎
- dosage: 6～9g
- note: 阴血亏虚者慎用
- status: active

### 益母草

- name: 益母草
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 辛、苦
- taste: 微寒
- meridian: 肝、心包、膀胱经
- functions: 活血调经，利尿消肿，清热解毒
- source: 唇形科植物益母草的干燥地上部分
- dosage: 9～15g
- note: 孕妇禁用，无瘀滞者慎用
- status: active

### 红花

- name: 红花
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 辛
- taste: 温
- meridian: 心、肝经
- functions: 活血通经，散瘀止痛
- source: 菊科植物红花的干燥花
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 孕妇禁用，有出血倾向者慎用
- status: active

### 桃仁

- name: 桃仁
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 苦、甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 心、肝、大肠经
- functions: 活血祛瘀，润肠通便，止咳平喘
- source: 蔷薇科植物桃或山桃的干燥成熟种子
- dosage: 6～10g
- note: 孕妇禁用，便溏者慎用
- status: active

### 牛膝

- name: 牛膝
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 苦、甘、酸
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肝、肾经
- functions: 逐瘀通经，补肝肾，强筋骨，利尿通淋，引血下行
- source: 苋科植物牛膝或川牛膝的干燥根
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 孕妇慎用，中寒泄泻者慎用
- status: active

### 桔梗

- name: 桔梗
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- nature: 苦、辛
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肺经
- functions: 宣肺，利咽，祛痰，排脓
- source: 桔梗科植物桔梗的干燥根
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 阴虚久咳、出血证及呕吐慎用
- status: active

### 杏仁

- name: 杏仁
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- nature: 苦
- taste: 微温
- meridian: 肺、大肠经
- functions: 止咳平喘，润肠通便
- source: 蔷薇科植物山杏、西伯利亚杏、东北杏或杏的干燥成熟种子
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 阴虚咳喘及大便溏泻者慎用
- status: active

### 天麻

- name: 天麻
- category: 平肝息风药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 肝经
- functions: 息风止痉，平抑肝阳，祛风通络
- source: 兰科植物天麻的干燥块茎
- dosage: 3～10g
- note: 气血亏虚者慎用
- status: active

### 三七

- name: 三七
- category: 活血化瘀药
- nature: 甘、微苦
- taste: 温
- meridian: 肝、胃经
- functions: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛
- source: 五加科植物三七的干燥根和根茎
- dosage: 3～9g
- note: 孕妇慎用
- status: active

### 灵芝

- name: 灵芝
- category: 补气药
- nature: 甘
- taste: 平
- meridian: 心、肺、肝、肾经
- functions: 补气安神，止咳平喘
- source: 多孔菌科真菌赤芝或紫芝的干燥子实体
- dosage: 6～12g
- note: 对本品过敏者禁用
- status: active

### TCM001

- chineseName: 人参
- englishName: Ginseng
- latinName: Panax ginseng C.A.Mey.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智
- activeConstituents: 人参皂苷(Rg1,Rb1,Rg3等)、多糖、氨基酸、微量元素
- dosage: 3-9g
- source: 五加科植物人参的干燥根和根茎

### TCM002

- chineseName: 黄芪
- englishName: Astragalus
- latinName: Astragalus membranaceus (Fisch.) Bunge
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌
- activeConstituents: 黄芪皂苷(黄芪甲苷)、黄芪多糖、黄酮类、氨基酸
- dosage: 9-30g
- source: 豆科植物蒙古黄芪或膜荚黄芪的干燥根

### TCM003

- chineseName: 当归
- englishName: Angelica sinensis
- latinName: Angelica sinensis (Oliv.) Diels
- category: 补血药
- efficacy: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便
- activeConstituents: 阿魏酸、藁本内酯、挥发油、多糖、氨基酸
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 伞形科植物当归的干燥根

### TCM004

- chineseName: 枸杞子
- englishName: Goji Berry
- latinName: Lycium barbarum L.
- category: 补阴药
- efficacy: 滋补肝肾，益精明目
- activeConstituents: 枸杞多糖、甜菜红素、胡萝卜素、维生素C、微量元素
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 茄科植物宁夏枸杞的干燥成熟果实

### TCM005

- chineseName: 金银花
- englishName: Honeysuckle
- latinName: Lonicera japonica Thunb.
- category: 清热解毒药
- efficacy: 清热解毒，疏散风热
- activeConstituents: 绿原酸、木犀草素、忍冬苷、挥发油
- dosage: 6-15g
- source: 忍冬科植物忍冬的干燥花蕾或带初开的花

### TCM006

- chineseName: 甘草
- englishName: Licorice
- latinName: Glycyrrhiza uralensis Fisch.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药
- activeConstituents: 甘草酸、甘草苷、异甘草素、黄酮类
- dosage: 2-10g
- source: 豆科植物甘草、胀果甘草或光果甘草的干燥根和根茎

### TCM007

- chineseName: 白术
- englishName: Atractylodes
- latinName: Atractylodes macrocephala Koidz.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎
- activeConstituents: 白术内酯、苍术酮、挥发油、多糖
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 菊科植物白术的干燥根茎

### TCM008

- chineseName: 茯苓
- englishName: Poria
- latinName: Poria cocos (Schw.) Wolf
- category: 利水渗湿药
- efficacy: 利水渗湿，健脾宁心
- activeConstituents: 茯苓酸、茯苓多糖、三萜类、蛋白质
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 多孔菌科真菌茯苓的干燥菌核

### TCM009

- chineseName: 川芎
- englishName: Chuanxiong
- latinName: Ligusticum chuanhong Hort.
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 活血行气，祛风止痛
- activeConstituents: 川芎嗪(四甲基吡嗪)、阿魏酸、藁本内酯、挥发油
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 伞形科植物川芎的干燥根茎

### TCM010

- chineseName: 丹参
- englishName: Salvia miltiorrhiza
- latinName: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 活血祛瘀，通经止痛，清心除烦，凉血消痈
- activeConstituents: 丹参酮(I,IIA,IIB等)、丹酚酸(SA、SB、SC等)、隐丹参酮
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 唇形科植物丹参的干燥根和根茎

### TCM011

- chineseName: 黄连
- englishName: Coptis
- latinName: Coptis chinensis Franch.
- category: 清热药
- efficacy: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒
- activeConstituents: 小檗碱(黄连素)、巴马汀、药根碱、黄连碱
- dosage: 2-5g
- source: 毛茛科植物黄连、三角叶黄连或云连的干燥根茎

### TCM012

- chineseName: 黄芩
- englishName: Scutellaria
- latinName: Scutellaria baicalensis Georgi
- category: 清热药
- efficacy: 清热燥湿，泻火解毒，止血，安胎
- activeConstituents: 黄芩苷、黄芩素、汉黄芩素、汉黄芩苷
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 唇形科植物黄芩的干燥根

### TCM013

- chineseName: 麻黄
- englishName: Ephedra
- latinName: Ephedra sinica Stapf
- category: 解表药
- efficacy: 发汗解表，宣肺平喘，利水消肿
- activeConstituents: 麻黄碱、伪麻黄碱、麻黄新碱、挥发油
- dosage: 2-9g
- source: 麻黄科植物草麻黄、中麻黄或木贼麻黄的干燥草质茎

### TCM014

- chineseName: 桂枝
- englishName: Cinnamon Twig
- latinName: Cinnamomum cassia Presl
- category: 解表药
- efficacy: 发汗解肌，温通经脉，助阳化气
- activeConstituents: 桂皮醛、桂皮酸、挥发油、鞣质
- dosage: 3-9g
- source: 樟科植物肉桂的干燥嫩枝

### TCM015

- chineseName: 白芍
- englishName: White Peony Root
- latinName: Paeonia lactiflora Pall.
- category: 补血药
- efficacy: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳
- activeConstituents: 芍药苷、氧化芍药苷、苯甲酰芍药苷、儿茶素
- dosage: 6-15g
- source: 毛茛科植物芍药的干燥根

### TCM016

- chineseName: 熟地黄
- englishName: Rehmannia (prepared)
- latinName: Rehmannia glutinosa Libosch. (processed)
- category: 补血药
- efficacy: 补血滋阴，益精填髓
- activeConstituents: 梓醇、毛蕊花糖苷、地黄苷、多糖、氨基酸
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 玄参科植物地黄的块根经炮制加工而成

### TCM017

- chineseName: 半夏
- englishName: Pinellia
- latinName: Pinellia ternata (Thunb.) Breit.
- category: 化痰止咳平喘药
- efficacy: 燥湿化痰，降逆止呕，消痞散结
- activeConstituents: 胆碱、高龙胆碱、半夏生物碱、半夏多糖
- dosage: 3-9g
- source: 天南星科植物半夏的干燥块茎

### TCM018

- chineseName: 陈皮
- englishName: Tangerine Peel
- latinName: Citrus reticulata Blanco
- category: 理气药
- efficacy: 理气健脾，燥湿化痰
- activeConstituents: 橙皮苷、川陈皮素、挥发油(柠檬烯)、黄酮类
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 芸香科植物橘及其栽培变种的干燥成熟果皮

### TCM019

- chineseName: 泽兰
- englishName: Eupatorium
- latinName: Eupatorium fortunei Turcz.
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 活血调经，祛瘀消痈，利尿消肿，清热解毒
- activeConstituents: 泽兰苷、齐墩果酸、黄酮类、挥发油
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 唇形科植物毛叶地瓜儿苗的干燥地上部分

### TCM020

- chineseName: 蒲公英
- englishName: Dandelion
- latinName: Taraxacum mongolicum Hand.-Mazz.
- category: 清热解毒药
- efficacy: 清热解毒，消肿散结，利湿通淋
- activeConstituents: 蒲公英甾醇、蒲公英醇、β-胡萝卜素、多糖、绿原酸
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 菊科植物蒲公英或同属数种植物的干燥全草

### TCM021

- chineseName: 柴胡
- englishName: Bupleurum
- latinName: Bupleurum chinense DC.
- category: 解表药
- efficacy: 疏散退热，疏肝解郁，升举阳气
- activeConstituents: 柴胡皂苷(a、b、d等)、柴胡皂苷元、挥发油、多糖
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 伞形科植物柴胡或狭叶柴胡的干燥根

### TCM022

- chineseName: 板蓝根
- englishName: Isatis Root
- latinName: Isatis indigotica Fort.
- category: 清热解毒药
- efficacy: 清热解毒，凉血利咽
- activeConstituents: 靛蓝、靛玉红、腺嘌呤、β-谷固醇、多糖
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 十字花科植物菘蓝的干燥根

### TCM023

- chineseName: 连翘
- englishName: Forsythia
- latinName: Forsythia suspensa (Thunb.) Vahl
- category: 清热解毒药
- efficacy: 清热解毒，消肿散结，疏散风热
- activeConstituents: 连翘脂素、连翘苷、挥发油、黄酮类
- dosage: 6-15g
- source: 木犀科植物连翘的干燥果实

### TCM024

- chineseName: 薄荷
- englishName: Peppermint
- latinName: Mentha haplocalyx Briq.
- category: 解表药
- efficacy: 疏散风热，清利头目，利咽，透疹，疏肝行气
- activeConstituents: 薄荷脑(薄荷醇)、薄荷酮、薄荷素油、黄酮类
- dosage: 3-6g
- source: 唇形科植物薄荷的干燥地上部分

### TCM025

- chineseName: 菊花
- englishName: Chrysanthemum
- latinName: Chrysanthemum morifolium Ramat.
- category: 解表药
- efficacy: 疏散风热，平抑肝阳，清肝明目，清热解毒
- activeConstituents: 菊花苷、木犀草素、黄酮类、挥发油、氨基酸
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 菊科植物菊头的干燥头状花序

### TCM026

- chineseName: 栀子
- englishName: Gardenia
- latinName: Gardenia jasminoides Ellis
- category: 清热药
- efficacy: 泻火除烦，清热利湿，凉血解毒
- activeConstituents: 栀子苷、藏红花素、藏红花酸、京尼平苷
- dosage: 6-10g
- source: 茜草科植物栀子的干燥成熟果实

### TCM027

- chineseName: 附子
- englishName: Aconite (prepared)
- latinName: Aconitum carmichaelii Debx. (processed)
- category: 温里药
- efficacy: 回阳救逆，补火助阳，散寒止痛
- activeConstituents: 乌头碱、次乌头碱、新乌头碱(经炮制后降低毒性)、苯甲酰乌头原碱
- dosage: 3-15g(先煎)
- source: 毛茛科植物乌头的子根的加工品

### TCM028

- chineseName: 干姜
- englishName: Dried Ginger
- latinName: Zingiber officinale Rosc. (dried)
- category: 温里药
- efficacy: 温中散寒，回阳通脉，温肺化饮
- activeConstituents: 姜辣素(gingerols)、姜烯酚(shogaols)、挥发油、氨基酸
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 姜科植物姜的干燥根茎

### TCM029

- chineseName: 五味子
- englishName: Schisandra
- latinName: Schisandra chinensis (Turcz.) Baill.
- category: 收涩药
- efficacy: 收敛固涩，益气生津，补肾宁心
- activeConstituents: 五味子素(木脂素类)、有机酸、挥发油、多糖
- dosage: 2-6g
- source: 木兰科植物五味子的干燥成熟果实

### TCM030

- chineseName: 麦冬
- englishName: Ophiopogon
- latinName: Ophiopogon japonicus (L.f.) Ker-Gawl.
- category: 补阴药
- efficacy: 养阴生津，润肺清心
- activeConstituents: 麦冬皂苷、高异黄酮、葡萄糖、果糖、甾体皂苷
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 百合科植物麦冬的干燥块根

### TCM031

- chineseName: 山茱萸
- englishName: Cornus Fruit
- latinName: Cornus officinalis Siebold & Zucc.
- category: 收涩药
- efficacy: 补益肝肾，收敛固涩
- activeConstituents: 莫诺苷、马钱子苷、连翘苷、环烯醚萜苷
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 山茱萸科植物山茱萸的干燥成熟果肉

### TCM032

- chineseName: 女贞子
- englishName: Ligustrum
- latinName: Ligustrum lucidum Ait.
- category: 补阴药
- efficacy: 滋补肝肾，明目乌发
- activeConstituents: 齐墩果酸、特女贞苷、甘露醇、油脂油
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 木犀科植物女贞的干燥成熟果实

### TCM033

- chineseName: 党参
- englishName: Codonopsis
- latinName: Codonopsis pilosula (Franch.) Nannf.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 健脾益肺，养血生津
- activeConstituents: 党参炔苷、多糖、氨基酸、微量元素(Se、Zn)
- dosage: 9-30g
- source: 桔梗科植物党参、素花党参或川党参的干燥根

### TCM034

- chineseName: 西洋参
- englishName: American Ginseng
- latinName: Panax quinquefolius L.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 补气养阴，清热生津
- activeConstituents: 人参皂苷(Rb1为主)、多糖、氨基酸、挥发油
- dosage: 3-6g
- source: 五加科植物西洋参的干燥根

### TCM035

- chineseName: 三七
- englishName: Notoginseng
- latinName: Panax notoginseng (Burk.) F.H.Chen
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛
- activeConstituents: 三七总皂苷(Rb1、Rg1、Rb3等)、田七氨酸、黄酮
- dosage: 3-9g(研末吞服1-3g)
- source: 五加科植物三七的干燥根和根茎

### TCM036

- chineseName: 何首乌
- englishName: Polygonum multiflorum
- latinName: Polygonum multiflorum Thunb.
- category: 补阴药
- efficacy: 制首乌:补肝肾，益精血，乌须发；生首乌:解毒，消痈，润肠通便
- activeConstituents: 蒽醌类(大黄酚、大黄素)、二苯乙烯苷(2,3,5,4'-THMG)、磷脂
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 蓼科植物何首乌的干燥块根

### TCM037

- chineseName: 灵芝
- englishName: Ganoderma
- latinName: Ganoderma lucidum (Leyss. ex Fr.) Karst.
- category: 补气药
- efficacy: 补气安神，止咳平喘
- activeConstituents: 灵芝多糖、三萜类(灵芝酸)、核苷类、蛋白质
- dosage: 6-12g
- source: 多孔菌科真菌赤芝或紫芝的干燥子实体

### TCM038

- chineseName: 芦荟
- englishName: Aloe
- latinName: Aloe barbadensis Miller
- category: 泻下药
- efficacy: 泻下通便，清肝杀虫
- activeConstituents: 芦荟苷、芦荟大黄素、羟芦荟苷、多糖
- dosage: 2-5g
- source: 百合科植物库拉索芦荟或好望角芦荟叶的汁液浓缩干燥物

### TCM039

- chineseName: 延胡索
- englishName: Corydalis
- latinName: Corydalis yanhusuo W.T.Wang
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 活血，利气，止痛
- activeConstituents: 延胡索乙素(四氢帕马丁)、延胡索甲素、丑素
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 罂粟科植物延胡索的干燥块茎

### TCM040

- chineseName: 远志
- englishName: Polygala
- latinName: Polygala tenuifolia Willd.
- category: 安神药
- efficacy: 安神益智，交通心肾，祛痰开窍，消肿
- activeConstituents: 远志皂苷、远志碱、远志醇、挥发油
- dosage: 3-10g
- source: 远志科植物远志或卵叶远志的干燥根

### TCM041

- chineseName: 酸枣仁
- englishName: Ziziphus seed
- latinName: Ziziphus jujuba Mill. var. spinosa (Bunge) Hu ex H.F.Chou
- category: 安神药
- efficacy: 养心补肝，宁心安神，敛汗，生津
- activeConstituents: 酸枣仁皂苷(A、B)、黄酮类、挥发油、脂肪酸
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 鼠李科植物酸枣的干燥成熟种子

### TCM042

- chineseName: 牛黄
- englishName: Calculus Bovis
- latinName: Bovine calculus
- category: 开窍药
- efficacy: 化痰开窍，凉肝息风，清热解毒
- activeConstituents: 胆红素、胆酸、去氧胆酸、胆固醇、微量元素
- dosage: 0.15-0.35g(入丸散)
- source: 牛胆囊、胆管或肝管中的结石

### TCM043

- chineseName: 麝香
- englishName: Moschus
- latinName: Moschus moschiferus L.
- category: 开窍药
- efficacy: 开窍醒神，活血通经，消肿止痛
- activeConstituents: 麝香酮、麝香醇、雄激素、蛋白质、肽类
- dosage: 0.03-0.1g(入丸散)
- source: 鹿科动物林麝、马麝或原麝成熟雄体香囊中的干燥分泌物

### TCM044

- chineseName: 石膏
- englishName: Gypsum
- latinName: Gypsum fibrosum
- category: 清热药
- efficacy: 清热泻火，除烦止渴，收敛生肌(煅)
- activeConstituents: 含水硫酸钙(CaSO4·2H2O)
- dosage: 15-60g(先煎)
- source: 硫酸盐类矿物硬石膏族石膏

### TCM045

- chineseName: 芒硝
- englishName: Mirabilite
- latinName: Mirabilite
- category: 泻下药
- efficacy: 泻下通便，润燥软坚，清火消肿
- activeConstituents: 含水硫酸钠(Na2SO4·10H2O)
- dosage: 6-12g(冲服)
- source: 硫酸盐类矿物芒硝族芒硝，经精制而得的结晶体

### TCM046

- chineseName: 决明子
- englishName: Cassia Seed
- latinName: Cassia obtusifolia L. 或 Cassia tora L.
- category: 清热药
- efficacy: 清热明目，润肠通便
- activeConstituents: 大黄酚、大黄素、大黄酸、芦荟大黄素、决明子苷
- dosage: 9-15g
- source: 豆科植物决明或小决明的干燥成熟种子

### TCM047

- chineseName: 益母草
- englishName: Leonurus
- latinName: Leonurus japonicus Houtt.
- category: 活血化瘀药
- efficacy: 活血调经，利尿消肿，清热解毒
- activeConstituents: 益母草碱(leonurine)、水苏碱、芦丁、黄酮类
- dosage: 9-30g
- source: 唇形科植物益母草的干燥地上部分

### TCM048

- chineseName: 杜仲
- englishName: Eucommia Bark
- latinName: Eucommia ulmoides Oliv.
- category: 补阳药
- efficacy: 补肝肾，强筋骨，安胎
- activeConstituents: 杜仲胶、松脂醇二葡萄糖苷、木脂素类、黄酮类
- dosage: 6-10g
- source: 杜仲科植物杜仲的干燥树皮

### TCM049

- chineseName: 淫羊藿
- englishName: Epimedium
- latinName: Epimedium brevicornu Maxim.
- category: 补阳药
- efficacy: 补肾阳，强筋骨，祛风湿
- activeConstituents: 淫羊藿苷(epimedin A/B/C)、朝藿定、淫羊藿次苷
- dosage: 6-10g
- source: 小蘖科植物淫羊藿、箭叶淫羊藿或柔毛淫羊藿的干燥叶

### TCM050

- chineseName: 肉苁蓉
- englishName: Cistanche
- latinName: Cistanche deserticola Y.C.Ma
- category: 补阳药
- efficacy: 补肾阳，益精血，润肠通便
- activeConstituents: 松果菊苷、毛蕊花糖苷、苯乙醇苷类、氨基酸
- dosage: 6-10g
- source: 列当科植物肉苁蓉或管花肉的干燥带鳞叶的肉质茎

### 人参

- name: 人参
- category: 根茎类
- nature: 微温
- flavor: 甘、微苦
- meridian: 脾、肺、心
- function: 大补元气，复脉固脱，补脾益肺，生津养血，安神益智
- usage: 3-9g，另煎兑服
- source: 中医药网

### 黄芪

- name: 黄芪
- category: 根茎类
- nature: 微温
- flavor: 甘
- meridian: 脾、肺
- function: 补气升阳，固表止汗，利水消肿，生津养血，行滞通痹，托毒排脓，敛疮生肌
- usage: 9-30g
- source: 中医药网

### 当归

- category: 根茎类
- nature: 温
- flavor: 甘、辛
- meridian: 肝、心、脾
- function: 补血活血，调经止痛，润肠通便
- usage: 6-12g
- source: 中医药网

- nature: 温

- meridian: 脾、胃
- function: 健脾益气，燥湿利水，止汗，安胎
- usage: 6-12g
- source: 中医药网

### 甘草

- name: 甘草
- category: 根茎类
- nature: 平
- flavor: 甘
- meridian: 心、肺、脾、胃
- function: 补脾益气，清热解毒，祛痰止咳，缓急止痛，调和诸药
- usage: 2-10g
- source: 中医药网

- flavor: 甘
- meridian: 肝、肾
- function: 滋补肝肾，益精明目
- usage: 6-12g

- function: 活血行气，祛风止痛

- function: 养血调经，敛阴止汗，柔肝止痛，平抑肝阳

- function: 利水渗湿，健脾，宁心

- function: 活血祛瘀，通经止痛，清心除烦，凉血消痈

### 黄连

- category: 根茎类
- nature: 微寒
- flavor: 苦、辛
- meridian: 肝、胆、肺
- function: 和解表里，疏肝升阳
- usage: 3-10g
- source: 中医药网

### 桂枝

- name: 桂枝
- category: 藤木类
- nature: 温
- flavor: 辛、甘
- meridian: 心、肺、膀胱
- function: 发汗解肌，温通经脉，助阳化气
- usage: 3-6g
- source: 中医药网

### 熟地黄

- nature: 微温
- flavor: 甘
- meridian: 肝、肾
- function: 补血滋阴，益精填髓
- usage: 9-15g

- nature: 微寒

- meridian: 心、肺、胃
- function: 养阴生津，润肺清心

- meridian: 肺、心、肾
- function: 收敛固涩，益气生津，补肾宁心

- meridian: 肝、胃
- function: 散瘀止血，消肿定痛

- nature: 热
- flavor: 辛、甘
- meridian: 心、肾、脾
- function: 回阳救逆，补火助阳，散寒止痛
- usage: 3-15g

### 麻黄

- function: 发汗解表，宣肺平喘，利水消肿
- usage: 2-9g

### 泽泻

- category: 根茎类
- nature: 寒
- flavor: 甘
- meridian: 肾、膀胱
- function: 利水渗湿，泄热，化浊降脂

- function: 收敛止血，消肿生肌

- function: 补血滋阴，润燥，止血

- meridian: 心、肝
- function: 活血通经，散瘀止痛
- usage: 3-10g

### 连翘

- category: 果实类
- nature: 微寒
- flavor: 苦

- function: 清热解毒，消肿散结，疏散风热
